programme.desc: When a potential buyer comes to Dunder Mifflin, Michael, Dwight, Andy and Pam pull out all the stops in the hopes of impressing him with their high profile contacts. Michael reminisces about all the great times they have had in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Sabre
programme.desc: When Sabre comes in to take over Dunder Mifflin, Michael struggles to accept the new policies. Pam and Jim have an interview at the daycare they are hoping to get accepted into.

programme.title: The Office: The Manager and the Salesman
programme.desc: Sabre's CEO visits and tells Michael and Jim that one of them must take a step down and go back to sales.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam's contractions begin but she and Jim are determined to wait it out as long as possible so they can have more time at the hospital. The office tries to distract Pam from the pain by entertaining her.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam and Jim make a blunder after their baby's birth; Michael sets up Erin with Kevin.

programme.title: The Office: St. Patrick's Day
programme.desc: Michael thinks he has impressed Jo, only to learn that someone else in the office has caught her eye.

programme.title: The Office: New Leads
programme.desc: When the sales staff lets Sabre's new 'sales is king' policy get to their heads, Michael hides their new, prized leads.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Behind the Mystery Special
programme.desc: Friedreich's Ataxia--a rare, genetic disease that causes progressive nervous system damage and movement problems; how Leukemia and Lymphoma Society is helping those undergoing clinical trials.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Brace Yourself
programme.desc: When Deacon's son draws a picture of Arthur with crooked teeth, Arthur convinces Doug and Carrie to pay for new braces. However, when Doug attempts to use a similar strategy on Carrie, his plan backfires. Meanwhile, Spence is hired as a cook and maid.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Home Cheapo
programme.desc: When Carrie learns that Deacon and Kelly bought a second home, she convinces Doug that they were able to afford it because they are so cheap.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Offensive Fowl
programme.desc: Carrie is supportive at first of Doug's cleaner approach to life, but quickly grows tired of him trying to force his new beliefs on her and having to eat meat while in private.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mild Bunch
programme.desc: A prank runs amok when Doug and his pal reunite at their 20th high school reunion and decide to have some fun with their old principal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Poisonous Affair
programme.desc: When cancer researcher Dr. George Blumenschein ends up admitted at his own hospital a toxic work environment may be to blame.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Tom Petty: Mysterious Ending
programme.desc: News of the sudden passing of celebrated rock musician Tom Petty shocked fans worldwide, but a deeper look into the music legend’s life reveals physical and emotional afflictions that may have led to his death at age 66.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of Jeffrey Dahmer
programme.desc: The chilling account of a man who survived his encounter with the notorious serial killer, who managed to evade police scrutiny for years.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Capturing the Unabomber
programme.desc: In a new interview, Ted Kacyznski's brother, the man who ultimately turned him in to the authorities, takes us behind the hunt that led to the capture of 'The Unabomber.'

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished
programme.desc: When in 1993, James Raymond Jordan Sr. goes missing and his luxury car is found stripped and abandoned in North Carolina, clues point to a tragic crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Life in the Extreme
programme.desc: It's late fall and the Browns kickstart their ambitious cabin build. Bam and Gabe go on a deer hunt as the family scrambles to pull off an 'extreme' wedding on the mountain, but days before the ceremony, things take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rumble in the Bush
programme.desc: Gabe is attacked by an aggressive ostrich and loses one of his most prized possessions in the process. When the ranch gets hit with the first snowfall, the family builds a big bonfire to unfreeze the ground under their house site.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Range Ridin'
programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Cold
programme.desc: The family deals with a life-threatening cold front and a deep freeze that halts their water supply, while Bear overnights in the wild as he absorbs life-changing news.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Beyond the Bush
programme.desc: The Wolfpack gathers and gets candid about untold secrets and burning questions that fans have wondered for years. From epic adventure to major struggles, they expose their world like never before.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: New Adventures in the Bush
programme.desc: The Wolfpack arrive on their new property in the most remote frontier of the lower 48. The Browns begin a barn build, the key to Billy's grand vision. As they attempt to start over, they reveal the relationships and values from decades in the wild.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Secrets of the Hunt
programme.desc: Hunting is more than a sport in the wilderness, it's a means of survival. Over decades in the Alaskan bush, the Browns have developed their own unique tricks and secrets to hunt like only the Wolfpack can.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: Man Overboard
programme.desc: The crew receives an ominous warning from the Coast Guard and must make a tough decision. Abandoning the mission would require overwintering in the Arctic, but a desperate attempt to push through and escape the Northwest Passage could be fatal.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Entering Wild, Wild Country
programme.desc: Leaving comfortable lives behind, strangers journey to Alaska chasing dreams of an off-grid community. With only 100 days until winter, it's a race against nature. They immediately set off to hunt moose, but struggle against the elements and each other.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Rogue Rage
programme.desc: The newly-formed group desperately hunts for moose. When Oliver refuses to go along with the plan and is an obstacle in the line of fire, Andrew pushes back. Army veteran Adam arrives at base camp and immediately tackles critical building projects.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Winter Scramble
programme.desc: Andrew and Gerrid celebrate a victorious moose hunt but a disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. A cold spell has everyone scrambling to build shelters and tensions between Oliver and the rest of the group reach explosive new heights.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Zombie Fish Apocalypse
programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colony's food supply. Pushing to build a second outpost, Adam sets off down river alone but when his canoe capsizes, he's at risk for hypothermia. Tensions between Oliver and the group reach a boiling point.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Frozen Out
programme.desc: Oliver's refusal to help prep fish is the last straw for Andrew and Jennifer, so the outpost founders push the others to force Oliver out. A sudden temperature plunge cuts Adam and Evan's bear hunt short. Winter's coming but the group is far from ready.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Hangry Days
programme.desc: Stranded, freezing and desperate for food, Adam and Evan make a dangerous journey to basecamp. When outpost founders Andrew and Jennifer take control of the food supply, it's the last straw for Adam. Oliver tries to survive solo as temperatures plummet.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo Roulette
programme.desc: Stuntman turned Repo Pilot Mike Kennedy skydives into an airfield to snatch a Dehavilland Twin Otter airplane. Later, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson make a risky two-vehicle snatch from a wealthy playboy.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Alone in Alaska
programme.desc: Adrenalin junkie Mike Kennedy boldly sets out into the remote Alaskan wilderness, braving wolf country and bitter temperatures, in a hunt for a Piper Super Cub.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Undercover and Out of Time
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy teams up in Southern California to snatch a plane in broad daylight, Kevin Lacey poses as a Cajun pilot to heist a $2-million prize and Ken Cage finds himself facing high winds and the threat of F-16s to make his payday.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Mid-Air Collision
programme.desc: Extreme turbulence over the Teton Range threatens disaster for Mike Kennedy, but a second crack at a $3-million Citation V offers Ken Cage and Danny Thompson a shot at redemption.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Rescue Repo
programme.desc: Super Repo Man Mike Kennedy boldly risks an emergency landing on a remote Alaskan glacier, while strongman Danny Thompson frees a $1.8-million Lear 31 from its hangar by hand.

programme.title: Conjoined Twins: After Separation
programme.desc: The separation of conjoined twins is among the rarest of medical procedures that many do not survive long enough to face. This is the story of three very different sets of conjoined twins and their lives after separation.

programme.title: Barcroft Pack Deal
programme.desc: Explores body transformations and people that suffer from strange and rare conditions that baffles the medical community.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Jackpot
programme.desc: Belinda is essentially immobilized by a lump on her neck. Nicole won't wed until she gets her armpit lump removed. Adela's chest and back are covered in wisdom spots. Nick foolishly removed a lipoma at home and now requires Dr. Lee's assistance.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: Lump Overboard
programme.desc: Audrey has a severe condition that leaves her with painful bumps on every inch of her body. An embarrassing armpit growth affects former marine Matt's self-esteem. Jaclyn has a lemon-sized bump on the back of her head.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: Bad to the Bone
programme.desc: Dr. Schaeffer meets Mark with feet so scary they make his kids cry, and Dr. Vincent's patient has a foot so crooked it could snap with each step. Dr. Haller's patient's rogue big toe is holding her back and cramping her style.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This is Zit
programme.desc: Jen has substantial growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain, and vertigo. Juliet is under emotional distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest. Gerald has a mysterious, kiwi-size lump on his middle finger.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: The Enormous Nose Nodules
programme.desc: Roger's case of rhinophyma is so extreme that he has difficulty breathing. The small, evenly spaced bumps all over Natalie's body are interfering with her life. Virginia thinks the equally sized lumps on her arms make her look like a football player.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: That Toe Has to Go!
programme.desc: A woman who walks on a giant mass of skin creates a big problem for Dr. Schaeffer, and Dr. Vincent meets a teenager with a big personality and an even bigger foot problem. Jolynn uses a grinder on her foot, and Dr. Haller can't believe what is going on.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Delusional Bride/ Talk to Me!/ Front Seat Baby
programme.desc: A pregnant woman delivers in the front seat of her car and a bride stops her wedding because she feels possessed by creatures crawling in her head. Later, a physician yells at her comatose heart attack patient, trying to get him to fight for his own life.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: Lump Overboard
programme.desc: Audrey has a severe condition that leaves her with painful bumps on every inch of her body. An embarrassing armpit growth affects former marine Matt's self-esteem. Jaclyn has a lemon-sized bump on the back of her head.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: Bad to the Bone

programme.title: Nightwatch: Guardians of the City

programme.title: Nightwatch: Freak Show

programme.title: Nightwatch: United We Stand

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dark Side of the City
programme.desc: For the men and women on the Nightwatch, two things never stop: the calls and the questions. The first responders do everything they can to save the victims of several shootings, a drug overdose and more.

programme.title: The First 48: Dead Sleep/ Tag Team
programme.desc: Det. Ballman investigates a brutal beating death in the close-knit east end neighbourhood.

programme.title: The First 48: Fear Factor/ Fall Guy

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Car Sick
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q freak out a focus group by reading ridiculous answers, and then participate in a thrilling toilet paper shootout in their favourite market. Plus, the loser’s fancy dinner party turns into the messiest ride of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Damned If You Do
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q take to the ice for a very slippery game. Then they head to the park to get support for some ridiculous causes, and tonight's loser is forced to relive the sins of his past before a captive, critical audience.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Below the Belt
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put their sword wielding skills to the test while teaching fencing, and one joker is especially 'en garde' when he faces an Olympian. Plus, the guys trim away their dignity while posing as fabulous hairstylists at a salon.

programme.desc: Bobby Flay is haunted when Food Network's Amanda Freitag and Katie Lee bring two ghosts from his past to the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Cheese Stands Alone
programme.desc: The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson and chef Giada De Laurentiis teams up again to bring the heat to Bobby Flay's kitchen. The dynamic duo has recruited Indian chef Paddy Rawal and Caribbean specialist chef Trey Lamont to set Bobby's kitchen ablaze.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: That's Amore
programme.desc: Food Network Star winner Christian Petroni teams up with chef Carla Hall and brings two dynamic chefs who have mastered the food of his motherland, Italy.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Keeping It Real
programme.desc: Ted Allen from 'Chopped' and TV host Jeannie Mai are keeping it real with Bobby, and they want a win. They stack the deck with two authentic cuisine experts, chefs Ryan DePersio and Giuseppe Fanelli, who want Bobby begging for Mamma Mia after they win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Gives You Goosebumps
programme.desc: The star ingredient gives everyone goosebumps, including Chopper’s Scott Conant and comedic actress Cheri Oteri. Texas chef Nick Walker and Bosnian chef Senada Grbic hope to return the favor to Bobby Flay with a win in the second round.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Break a Plate!
programme.desc: Two Italian-cuisine cutthroats, chefs Adam Leonti and Anthony Scolaro, face off for a shot at scuffing up Bobby's record with a loss. Rachael Ray and Damaris Phillips determine who has the sauce to take on the boss.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clear the Deck
programme.desc: It's all hands-on deck when Napa Valley's Daniel Gomez Sanchez competes against Atlanta's Matthew Ridgway. TV host Daphne Oz and Food Network's Eddie Jackson hold nothing back when it comes to slaying Bobby Flay.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pole Lox
programme.desc: At Doug's encouragement, Carrie reluctantly agrees to start taking pole dancing lessons, but quickly starts to enjoy the classes and begins feeling better about herself. However, when Carrie puts on a show for him, he is shocked by how badly she dances.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Gods and Aliens
programme.desc: Myths and legends have long been regarded as fantastic stories that describe powerful gods, mutant giants and fearsome monsters. Take a look at why so many cultures separated by large distances tell the same stories.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Throughout history, people have claimed to have otherworldly knowledge, and have led followers to commit horrific acts of violence. Take a look at the links that could exist between these cults, and aliens.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Mega-Disasters
programme.desc: There are numerous historical, religious and mythic accounts of ancient civilizations being wiped out by volcanoes, earthquakes, floods, and meteors. Celestial beings may also have had a hand in the ancient world's catastrophic disasters.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Monoliths
programme.desc: Ancient people achieved extraordinary feats of construction without advanced tools or technology. Look at the possibility that extraterrestrials instructed the ancients, or they may have been driven to create them in order to reconnect.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Emperors, Kings and Pharaohs
programme.desc: Discusses if it is possible that ancient rulers were connected with divine or extraterrestrial forces.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Legends of lost and mysterious islands, advanced civilizations and Eden-like paradises have been told by sailors throughout human history. Find out if these stories are more than just myths of imaginative seafarers.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Treasures of the Gods
programme.desc: Sealed vaults possessing a strange and deadly curse, mysterious relics believed to be under otherworldly protection, and riches so priceless, it has cost men their lives. On every continent, there are stories of incredible lost treasures.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Breeders
programme.desc: In cultures throughout the world, there are tales of intimate encounters with otherworldly beings. Scientific deconstruction of human genetic makeup has revealed that our origins are not what we once believed.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Messages
programme.desc: Some believe that embedded in our most sacred religious texts, as well as in the design and location of ancient monuments, are secret messages that may reveal the purpose behind our very existence.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: They Came From the Sky
programme.desc: Ancient cultures from around the world believed that meteorites were not merely rocks that fell from the sky, but sacred stones imbued with the power of the Gods.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Something Pol, Something New
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Cow I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: It's spring, and there's no shortage of mama drama at Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Game of Goats
programme.desc: In this enhanced show, spring has sprung in central Michigan and that means birthing season. It’s a baby bonanza at Pol Veterinary Services, where the docs have their hands full with some beautiful babies.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Another One Fights the Doc
programme.desc: It’s a wild week of false alarms, around-the-clock emergencies, and some good old-fashioned detective work by the docs at Pol Veterinary Services.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The 11th Hour
programme.desc: Alaskans struggle to survive the brief, cold and dark days as winter overtakes the land.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Unexplained Encounters
programme.desc: Strange sightings of mysterious lights and orbs are common in the Bermuda Triangle, and to find the truth behind these unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Monster in the Abyss
programme.desc: A team of experts are hot on the trail of the legendary sea monster that's reported to live in the underwater caves of the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and witness testimony, they dive into these chambers to hunt for the deadly beast.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: US Navy vs. the Triangle
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally explain the truth behind one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances, when 306 US Navy crewmen vanished in the Triangle without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Mystery of the Teleporting Shipwreck
programme.desc: When a credible witness claims to have discovered the wreckage of a long-lost ship, experts launch an investigation to positively identify the missing vessel and uncover how it could be more than 10 miles from where it reportedly sank.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Witchcraft in the Devil's Triangle
programme.desc: A new lead might finally solve the mystery of the Witchcraft, one of the strangest disappearances on record in the Bermuda Triangle. A cutting-edge expedition leads experts to a shocking discovery on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Ghost Ship Terror
programme.desc: Ghost ship sightings are frequent in the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge underwater technology and witness testimony, a team of experts turn up new evidence to explain why sailors and crewmen vanish from their boats without a trace.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Bermuda Triangle: Hunt for the Cotopaxi
programme.desc: The disappearance of the SS Cotopaxi helped launch the legend of the Bermuda Triangle. Today, a team of experts follow fresh leads with cutting-edge tech to investigate if a mysterious wreck off the coast of Florida is indeed the long-lost ship.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Titanic's Lost Sister
programme.desc: When a sister ship of the Titanic gets embroiled in war with a hidden enemy, the former luxury liner is sent to the bottom of the ocean; new discoveries and cutting-edge underwater technology might finally reveal the secret history of its sinking.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Ghost Fleet of Doom
programme.desc: Discoveries reveal the treasures of a ghost fleet of Japanese ships at the bottom of the South Pacific, and using cutting-edge underwater technology, experts are investigating a top-secret superweapon that could have changed the course of World War II.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Curse of the Armada Graveyard
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into a deep-sea graveyard of twenty-five shipwrecks reveals the dark secrets of the biggest naval battle in history. Using the latest tech, experts follow new evidence into the mysterious abyss of long-lost battleships.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Haunting at Lake Erie
programme.desc: A mysterious shipwreck at the bottom of Lake Erie could be the oldest wreck in America's most notorious ship graveyard, and using cutting-edge underwater archaeological methods, experts investigate new leads in this 200-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Killer Collection
programme.desc: Gary and Jan Tyrrell are a beloved couple living in a quaint suburb of Springfield, Missouri. The tight-knit community is soon rocked by their double homicide, with friends and neighbours looking at those closest to the pair as their potential killer.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Any Other Day
programme.desc: When Shirlee Sherman and Thomas Hunter are found stabbed to death in an upscale home in Omaha, Nebraska, suspects and clues are in short supply. It will take Detectives five years to zero on a perpetrator, but not before he kills again.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Dragged to Hell
programme.desc: Amanda Storms watches her high school sweetheart transform from great stepdad to abusive husband. When he moves out, she's grateful for the help of her friend Andrew Shepherd - until a terrible night of violence changes everything.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Billy Frietag is a free-spirited young man who spends the warmer months working the family fruit and vegetable farm, and travels when it's cold. Tragically, it's his openness and generosity that lead to strange set of events which culminate in his death.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: There's No Winning in Murder
programme.desc: Corrinna Martin learns that her daughter Alyssiah is missing. After a state-wide search, a discovery confirms Corrinna's worst fears, opening a murder investigation. As a pattern of abuse against Alyssiah is uncovered, tragedy devastates the family again.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Pressure Point
programme.desc: A Virginia Beach massage therapist disappears before work, sparking an intense but fruitless search. Weeks later, a cyclist discovers trash bags in a swamp, the contents of which will rock the town and forever change the lives of Brianna's loved ones.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder
programme.desc: Theresa Wesolowski was murdered on May 29, 1999, leaving police baffled for nearly 10 years. They finally got a break in the case when a new DNA technique identified a co-worker, Mark Libecki, who was convicted of 1st degree murder in 2009.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: There's No Winning in Murder
programme.desc: Corrinna Martin learns that her daughter Alyssiah is missing. After a state-wide search, a discovery confirms Corrinna's worst fears, opening a murder investigation. As a pattern of abuse against Alyssiah is uncovered, tragedy devastates the family again.

programme.desc: A Virginia Beach massage therapist disappears before work, sparking an intense but fruitless search. Weeks later, a cyclist discovers trash bags in a swamp, the contents of which will rock the town and forever change the lives of Brianna's loved ones.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Billy Frietag is a free-spirited young man who spends the warmer months working the family fruit and vegetable farm, and travels when it's cold. Tragically, it's his openness and generosity that lead to strange set of events which culminate in his death.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Jessica Goebel is brutally stabbed in her own home and left to die near her young children. Two suspects emerge, father to her children John Hemminger and new boyfriend Richard Hanley. Jessica's sister Shannon relives the details of her sister's death.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Murder on the Tracks
programme.desc: Robert Limon is murdered in a seemingly random attack while working on the railroad. Robert's sister Christina is distraught and desperate for answers. Years later detectives uncover a sinister plot to murder him involving those closest to Robert.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Good Cop, Bad Cop: Solving the Murder of Heather Bogle
programme.desc: An Ohio mother is brutally murdered. A detective pursues the wrong suspects, while the real killer walked free. It would take a dedicated sheriff to find a real suspect.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Student of Murder
programme.desc: The death of a Seattle wine steward driving home puts the city on edge. The murder grabbed headlines and the attention of the city's commuters. Investigators need to determine if this was a random act of road rage or just a killer looking for kicks.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened to Rachael?
programme.desc: A year after a young teacher was gunned down outside of her Pennsylvania home, there is still no arrest and many wonder if this case will ever be solved.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Enrico Forti
programme.desc: A former TV producer and windsurfing champion says he’s in prison for a murder he didn’t commit. The only physical evidence against him: a teaspoon of sand.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Film director Adrienne Shelly is discovered hanging by a bed sheet from the shower rod in her bathroom. It looks like a suicide, but her husband insists it was murder. And detectives are starting to believe him...

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Deadly Divorce
programme.desc: A Milwaukee mother is murdered in 1981. Her sons describe a masked man with a ponytail fleeing the home. Was it her bitter cop ex-husband? Or a neighbor who claims his gun was stolen? Police make a shocking arrest, but some have doubts to this day.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Ride With the Devil
programme.desc: 26-year-old car dealer Christopher O'Brien takes a strange man for a test drive and never returns. Did O'Brien's criminal past finally catch up with him? Or is the truth something more sinister?

programme.title: Predator at Large: It Was A Thrill To Him
programme.desc: Women are bring murdered in Washington County, Oregon. A serial killer is one step ahead of the police. The community lives in fear. But only after more bloodshed do residents discover that the brutal killer has been living in plain sight all along.

programme.title: Predator at Large: He's Gonna Do It to Your Daughter
programme.desc: The peace of Raynham, Massachussets is forever shattered when cheerleader Mary Lou Arruda goes missing two days after her 15th birthday. The vast search effort to find her ends nine weeks later in the Freetown Forest, with a chilling discovery.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Such a Pretty Girl
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Carrie Jopek has disappeared. For her terrified friends and family, she seems to have vanished into thin air. But soon after, her body is found underneath a neighbour's porch -- which sets off a hunt for her killer that spans decades.

programme.title: American Monster: Stay with Me
programme.desc: Diana Lovejoy and husband Greg Mulvihill live happily in southern California. But when accusations rock the marriage and a mysterious phone call ends with an attempted murder, police uncover the shocking truth behind this once dream couple.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Explosives
programme.desc: Explosives are the terrifying sound and fury of modern warfare, annihilating any military target that threatens an army's personnel or stands in their way.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Inside the Gangster's Code: The Camorra
programme.desc: Lou visits Naples, a place with one of the oldest, most powerful gangs in the world – The Camorra. A number of bodies have recently been found in the city, causing world headlines.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Freemasons
programme.desc: The most secret of secret societies, The Freemasons, are intertwined with American history. Most of the Founding Fathers and 14 Presidents were Freemasons. Some say Washington DC is laid out as a Masonic code.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Brothels
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind one of society's most clandestine institutions: brothels. Hidden within these bordellos are secrets about famous patrons, governments, and even religion.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Alcatraz
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities. Underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time and have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: Battlefield
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the government of Israel is releasing top secret documents detailing the secret plans, strategies and implementation of their raid on the Iraqi nuclear facility in 1981, one of the most daring and successful military strikes ever.

programme.title: Ancient UFO Encounters

programme.title: Deep Sea UFO Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting our oceans.

programme.desc: When it comes to identifying mysterious, unknown objects in our skies, there are few more qualified than pilots and astronauts. Through amazing first-hand accounts we'll learn that sightings by these experts are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Enchanted in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Mathews, Virginia
programme.desc: A couple hunts for a new forever home near the beach in Mathews, VA. They find a house that could be perfect for their family of four but it's a fixer-upper and their budget is tight.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East
programme.desc: Middle Eastern cuisine comes from more than ten countries, making it some of the most diverse and popular food on the planet.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern returns to the European epicenter of fashion, art and commerce. Paris is home to rich and masterful cuisine, and Andrew finds the best places to get everything from traditional pot au feu topped with with bone marrow to fresh steak tartare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Louisville, Kentucky
programme.desc: Andrew explores Louisville icons like country ham, burgoo stew, and derby pie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern goes on a gastronomic tour of Las Vegas, NV. From quail breast stuffed with foie gras and mouth-watering Waygu steaks to classic veal Parmigiana and tantalizing Thai, Sin City has it all.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern checks out San Juan, Puerto Rico's comfort foods, and beach eats.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Miami
programme.desc: Miami's beaches and glitzy nightlife make it an international hot spot, but it's the food that really gives this city flavour. From Cuban sandwiches to fresh stone crabs and key lime pie, Andrew reveals Miami's iconic foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Buenos Aires
programme.desc: In Buenos Aires, a strong sense of tradition drives the food culture. Barbecued beef, chimichurri and sweet dulce de leche are featured as Andrew uncovers the mashup of mingling cultures that influence the city's cuisine.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand

programme.title: Movie: Hancock
programme.desc: An alcoholic superhero, that alienates the public as he saves their lives, has a chance encounter with a public relations person.

programme.title: Movie: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: A man and woman are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Fall and Order
programme.desc: A woman returns home to save her dad's annual fall festival on her family's pumpkin farm. While there, she runs into an old rival, and sparks fly.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Dollywood
programme.desc: When a NYC event planner returns to Tennessee to plan the Christmas celebration at Dollywood, she's paired with the head of operations who thinks he can handle the party just fine on his own.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Twice in a Lifetime
programme.desc: Rose briefly rekindles a romance she had with Buzz Mueller, but realizes she loves Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sisters and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Blanche is dumbfounded to discover that her sister, Charmaine, has written a novel.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Cheaters
programme.desc: Dorothy surprises herself and her housemates by having a relationship with a married man.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Mangiacavallo Curse Makes a Lousy Wedding Present
programme.desc: Sophia disrupts a wedding celebration by saying that she cursed the groom's grandfather.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: Dorothy risks everything when she lets her gambling problem get out of control.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: Frasier: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: Niles' new apartment building doesn't allow cats or dogs, so Niles get a new cockatoo. However, his decision to throw a party to meet his new neighbours is ruined when the bird attaches itself to Niles' head.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Krantz and Gouldenstein Are Dead
programme.desc: Roz develops a reputation as the 'angel of death' after everyone she takes care of at a retirement home dies on her. Meanwhile, Frasier ponders what effect his talk show has on people.

programme.title: Frasier: The Unnatural
programme.desc: Upon learning that the radio station's softball team is short one player, Frasier's son, Frederick, insists his dad should fill in. Not wanting to let his son down, Frasier asks Martin to help him learn how to play.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Turn
programme.desc: When Roz decides to audition for her own radio show, Frasier mistakenly tells his agent, Bebe, that he would be sad to see Roz go. Frasier is outraged when Bebe tells the station manager that Frasier would quit if Roz got her own show.

programme.title: Frasier: Ham Radio
programme.desc: Frasier volunteers to recreate the radio station's first ever mystery play, but disaster looms when his only professional actor quits. Family and friends help Frasier as he struggles to perform each role.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup
programme.desc: Niles attends a benefit with Frasier in the hopes of meeting an eligible woman, but it is Frasier who ends up with all the attention. While Frasier juggles three dates in three days, he also has to mend his father's strained relationship with Sherry.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup
programme.desc: Niles attends a benefit with Frasier in the hopes of meeting an eligible woman, but it is Frasier who ends up with all the attention. While Frasier juggles three dates in three days, he also has to mend his father's strained relationship with Sherry.

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne Hates Sherry
programme.desc: Daphne and Sherry clash over their relationship with Martin, so Daphne stays at Niles's.

programme.title: Frasier: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Niles receives divorce papers from Maris and to show he is not as spineless as people think, he signs them immediately. Later, he begins to regret his impulsiveness and seeks counsel from Martin and Frasier.

programme.title: Frasier: Ask Me No Questions
programme.desc: Niles wonders if he and Maris are meant to be together and he asks Frasier for his opinion. Touched that Niles would ask him such an important question, Frasier ponders the deceptively simple question for days.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: An FBI agent investigates the girls' lives for a possible visit from President Bush. This leads the girls to reminisce about times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The President's Coming
programme.desc: When the FBI agent announces that George Bush will make a visit to their home, the girls continue to reminisce and Dorothy quickly readies a list of points she wants to make to the president.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf
programme.desc: Rose makes a stunning discovery while admitting a patient at the hospital. Meanwhile, Sophia has to have surgery, but a mix-up occurs after the operation and Sophia becomes lost in the hospital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: If at Last You Do Succeed
programme.desc: Stan has finally hit it big with a new invention, but still Dorothy can't be happy for him. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche fight over some war bonds that, if cashed, could bankrupt St. Olaf.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Snap Out of It
programme.desc: Blanche is dreading her birthday and Dorothy helps Sophia with 'Meals on Wheels.'

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Wham, Bam, Thank You, Mammy
programme.desc: Blanche's childhood nanny reappears and reveals a surprise about Blanche's father.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Weekend

programme.title: The Office: The Chump

programme.title: The Office: Whistleblower

programme.title: The Office: Nepotism

programme.title: The Office: Counselling

programme.title: The Office: Andy's Play

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Don't Worry It's His Sister

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Bad Parents

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Cabin

programme.desc: A married woman has a one-night stand with a man, and he soon becomes obsessed with her. And he's not just a stalker- he's also a murderer.

programme.title: Movie: The Cheerleader Murders
programme.desc: A cheerleader from a cursed town with a string of tragedies investigates when two of her fellow squad mates are kidnapped and one of them turns up dead. Every step closer to the truth is a step closer to death.

programme.title: Movie: Identity Theft of a Cheerleader
programme.desc: After dropping out of high school, a 31 year old woman steals the identity of high school senior to redo her final year, no matter who gets in her way.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.desc: The Cornelia crew fights to save their gear from sea ice. Jake risks the far north to fill his tanks before his son's birth. Amid news of a looming pandemic, Russian boats mysteriously disappear and captains race to dock before crab prices crash.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Freezer Burn
programme.desc: When the temperature plummets to a season low, Shawn fights frozen ground with steam heat. Kris' hot plan to beat the cold fizzles quickly. Vernon gambles on a new spot.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch
programme.desc: Get a sneak peak at the new series Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: Clips include a Naval pilot bailing out of a crippled plane moments before crashing; two men outrun a destructive mudslide, a tornado sends cars flying and a police dash cam catches a tanker truck fire.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Army: Shaun Brewer and Service Dog Gunnar
programme.desc: Veteran Shaun Brewers shares his story of PTSD and his bond with his service dog Gunnar.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Performance Pinto
programme.desc: The team continues converting the rusted '71 Pinto into a European performance car despite the passed deadline. Unwilling to compromise on the original vision, Chad presses on both day and night to get his creation ready for its dramatic big city reveal.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: Bass Pro Tour: 2020 Stage Five Knockout Round - Sturgeon Bay
programme.desc: The Stage Five Knockout Round of Bass Pro Tour, from Sturgeon Bay, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Floating Fish Factory
programme.desc: Mike travels to Alaska and explores how fish are prepared aboard a processing ship.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dairy Cow Midwife
programme.desc: In Indiana, Mike learns how to milk, clean, and inseminate cows, and he delivers calves.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dirty Jobs of the Big Apple
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty in the Big Apple after climbing atop a building to clean the water tower.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Aerial Tram Greaser
programme.desc: Mike travels to Palm Springs to help maintain and repair the tram 8,500 feet above ground.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Turkey Inseminator
programme.desc: Mike crawls through rat drops, falling insulation and debris to make a house more energy efficient and he visits a turkey farm where he gets to suck semen out of a bunch of large-breasted birds.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Ice Salvage Crew
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty in Alaska as he helps protect the environment.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wind Farm Technician
programme.desc: Mike Rowe heads to an Oklahoma wind farm and learns that going green sometimes means you've got to get brown first.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Greenland Shark Quest
programme.desc: Mike Rowe heads to Greenland to learn about one of the more obscure sharks.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: The Nature of the Beast
programme.desc: A former United States Marine works through the fallout of her addiction; a woman involved in a drug cartel seeks redemption.

programme.title: Cellblock 6: Female Lock Up: Easier Said Than Done
programme.desc: A newcomer to jail turns to a more experienced inmate for comfort, but gets more than she bargained for.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: B90 Strikes Back!: The NeverEnding Story
programme.desc: Stephanie reveals a secret, Geoffrey follows his heart and Darcey looks ahead to the future. David and Lana spend their last bit of time together. Ed hopes for a second chance, and Lisa and Usman must say goodbye.

programme.desc: Our couples reunite from their own homes. Angela and Michael struggle with trust issues. Elizabeth's family questions Andrei's integrity. Colt clashes with his exes. Asuelu's coronavirus habits are questioned.

programme.desc: The story continues as the couples try to navigate life after the wedding.
