programme.desc: The story continues as the couples try to navigate life after the wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dazed and Gown-fused
programme.desc: Bride Nicole comes in with a very specific style of dress in mind, but discovers it may not suit her. Indecisive Katy has already tried on 50 gowns elsewhere and still doesn't know what she wants. Cy can't choose between two perfect dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Dress like None the Rest
programme.desc: Broadway star Sutton Foster hunts for a dress to top all the other dresses she's worn. Wedding dress model Lauren fears she has worn too many gowns to find one that feels special. Hope is renewing her vows and this time she wants to wear her dream dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: All Hands on Deck
programme.desc: Former model Meghan flew from St. Louis to find the perfect dress for her wedding to MLB star Jim Edmonds. Picky fashion buyer Lauren is back for her second visit. GMA meteorologist Ginger Zee tries on her reconstructed Pnina gown for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sample Sale Madness!
programme.desc: It's shopping chaos at Kleinfeld's blow-out sale! Danielle and Kathryn want the same gown- but there's only one and Jessica is in search of one very specific dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Seal of Approval
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to look like a 'sex kitten' on her big day, but her mom wishes for something modest. Second-time bride Lisa's mother is very opinionated about her dress choices. Elizabeth fears her mom won't approve the $13K gown she bought without her.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father Knows Dress
programme.desc: Caitie and her wedding planner father do not see eye-to-eye on a gown. Danielle lost her mother to cancer, so Dad steps in to help her make the big decision. Chic Ciccarelli is back for her fitting, channelling her deceased father every step of the way.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: Persia has flown from L.A. in search of a $14K Pnina dress, but no one can locate it. Katrice's two brothers, NFL stars Thomas and Julius Jones, secretly plan to purchase her gown. Fitting bride Brittany is shocked by an unwanted addition to her dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Style Therapy
programme.desc: Edgy bride Callie is more concerned with pleasing her mom than sticking to her own style.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy, I Think I Got This
programme.desc: New consultant Shay is excited to help with a surprise marriage proposal, but trouble brews when he rejects Randy's offer to help. Former Miss USA Nia Sanchez has just one day to find her gown. Comedian Jamie learns dress shopping is no laughing matter.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I've Stalked This Dress on Instagram
programme.desc: Chic designer Hayley Paige is getting married and makes three one-of-a-kind dresses for her big day. Bride Elisabeth comes to Kleinfeld with one goal: to buy her dream Hayley Paige gown. LaKesha, a superfan of designer Lazaro, gets a shock at the salon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Afraid to Try New Things
programme.desc: Wedding planner Rachel is excited to try on dresses so edgy they might scare off other brides. Plus, Natalie also wants a unique gown, but she's worried about getting her traditional mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm Not the Size of a Hanger!
programme.desc: Southern bride Danielle gets some help from her girlfriends in the quest to find the perfect glamorous gown. Jen is having a beer-themed wedding, but wants her dress to be more traditional. Katie worries her large assets won't fit in her wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Come on in, Grandma!
programme.desc: Amanda's biggest challenge is finding a dress both she and her opinionated grandmother love. Hillary searches for a specific gown her late grandmother adored. Macie already found her dream dress, but now Grandma wants to see her in something different.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Rainbow Unicorn Dress
programme.desc: Sharde dreams of a colourful dress to suit her rainbow unicorn wedding, but her mother does not approve. Bride Spencer wants a very avant-garde and dramatic gown for her big day. Sarah is shocked when the scissors come out during her fitting appointment.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Won the Battle Against My Twin!
programme.desc: Bride Margo struggles to get her twin sister's approval of the dresses she tries on. Brenda needs all four of her sisters to agree with her dress choice. Amy is trying on her super sexy gown, but worries her twin sister will think it's too revealing.

programme.title: Medical Anomalies
programme.desc: Nicky Freeman is 40 with the body of a ten year old. Gabby Williams is 6 but no different to a newborn. Both age one year for every four and doctors have no idea why.

programme.title: Little and Looking for Love
programme.desc: TLC presents an intimate portrait of 19-year-old primordial dwarf Hannah, who faces ordinary challenges with an extraordinary condition. As she journeys through the tumultuous and sometimes heart-breaking rites of adolescence, her resilience is inspiring.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: World's Smallest Woman: Meet Jyoti
programme.desc: Meet Jyoti Amge, the smallest woman in the world. At 24 inches tall and a mere 12 pounds, Jyoti is in the U.S. for work and to explore American culture. She also hopes to find a doctor for a serious health issue her two broken legs.

programme.title: Obese and Expecting
programme.desc: Four moms-to-be who are morbidly obese challenge the odds on their journey to motherhood.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: My Pregnant Husband
programme.desc: Ari and Caitlin and Myles and Precious experience the joy of a transgender pregnancy when Ari and Myles, the men in their relationships, become pregnant. The couples must conquer unique obstacles when the person carrying and birthing their child is a man.

programme.title: Fresh Out Live
programme.desc: Fresh Out Live delivers the most important music and pop culture news of the week and beyond with artist interviews, in-studio performances, album drops, and tour announcements.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sand Castles in the Sand/ Shell Shocked
programme.desc: A friendly day of building sand castles soon turns into all out war when SpongeBob and Patrick use their sand creations to battle each other. When Gary's shell breaks, SpongeBob tries to find him a replacement.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Student Starfish/ Clams
programme.desc: Pat joins SpongeBob at boating school; Mr. Krabs takes Bob and Squid fishing.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: The Greater Good

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Ghost of Plankton/ Graveyard Shift

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Toasted
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q get in a pickle serving up humiliating tasks as deli waiters, and later, they step behind the counter asking customers to settle a series of silly debates. Plus, tonight's big loser gets burned during an embarrassing toast.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Name That Kitchen
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out some righteous spots that say a lot in the name. In Fort Collins, Colo., an NFL pro and Triple-D alum team up on gangster green chili and mile-high burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Southern and South of the Border
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into sandwiches, Southern eats and south-of-the-border specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Totally Unexpected
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers great food in some unexpected places, including a bowling alley, a car wash and Laundromat in Austin and a historic neighbourhood grocery store in Atlanta with fried quail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Flavortown Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits some of the best of Flavortown, starting in San Diego, where an Asian-inspired noodle house is takin' over the neighborhood. In New Orleans, a neighborhood bistro bounces back from Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going big on the pig. In Colorado Springs, a funky food truck serves its pork fusion on loaded platters and Central American arepas. In Minneapolis, an Asian joint tucked away in a grocery store dishes out barbecued pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked and Barbecued
programme.desc: Things are cookin' all kinds of ways in Flavortown. First, Guy Fieri checks in on a diner in San Diego where law enforcement hones their skills and stuffs their gills.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pork and Peru
programme.desc: On this trip Guy digs into killer grub like Michigan-made pizza pie and Philly sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Finger Lickin' Chicken
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is chickening out across the country, from a sandwich shop outside Boston to a Filipino favourite in Los Angeles. Plus, a joint in Cleveland brings Guy's catchphrase to life with the Winner Winner Chicken Dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Serious Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy tries out righteous sandwiches in this episode. In Austin, a gourmet sandwich shop serves up duck pastrami and a knuckle sandwich. In Vegas, a roast beef po boy is done the Cajun way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Standards to Standouts
programme.desc: Guy is hitting up all kinds of joints, from classic Italian to Modern Americana. In Jackson, a California chef is bringing his brand of Mexican to the mountains.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Indulgent Dishes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's indulging himself in righteous, rich recipes. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a crazy seafood spot is reelin' in off-the-hook gumbo and a spicy mahi specialty. Across town, a mother-daughter team is servin' up savoury lamb ragout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kings and Queens Of 'Cue
programme.desc: Guy's got the line on some killer barbecue. In Compton, Calif., the backyard joint cuttin' up ribs and real deal collard greens.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grabbin' a Sandwich
programme.desc: Guy heads to Salt Lake City and samples meatball subs and Philly cheese steaks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Finger Lickin' Chicken

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Funky Joints
programme.desc: Guy chases down some funky joints doing serious cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Picked 'Em

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fast Food Their Way
programme.desc: In Honolulu, Hawaii, there is a 48-year-old drive-in where burgers and dogs come with rice and macaroni salad. In Nashville, Tenn., a Jamaican cafeteria at the farmer's market serves mango chutney chicken and curried goat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Crepes to Kreplach
programme.desc: Guy finds a crepe joint stacking them 21-high in a butter rum caramel cake, and then a deli cooking stuffed cabbage and kreplach.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Long Time Legends
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out places locals have been loving for decades In San Francisco, Omaha, and in Pittsburgh.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Something Different
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a West Virginia joint built from old transportation buses.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Fast Food
programme.desc: Guy tracks down some great places that prove fast food can also be great food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers and Dogs
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits classic burger and hot dog joints including: a Baltimore spot for Coney dogs from an 80 year old recipe; an Austin, TX, eatery known for Serrano peppers and hot buffalo sauce burgers; and a Minneapolis dog and burger dive.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Bites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's living large and going supersize! He's digging in to Cincinnati chili piled up six different ways, burgers stacked to the max from Ann Arbor, Mich., and a behemoth breakfast in Springfield, Ill.

programme.desc: It's all about speed as Ree Drummond shares four recipes she can make PDQ- pretty darn quickly. With her kids behind the camera, she whips up pancetta and butternut squash pasta, shortcut taco soup, 10-minute Philly dogs and 3-ingredient chocolate cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: First Time for Everything

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Femme Fatale

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Devil in Our Country
programme.desc: A pleasant Michigan day takes a dark turn when a field hand digs up a human skull in a sprawling backyard. The discovery leaves a tight knit community shaken to its core and questioning whether a killer has penetrated the safety of their town.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Toxic Relations
programme.desc: Linda Curry had it all: looks, a great job and a brilliant husband. When she got sick, doctors were stumped. Then, she died and police were as puzzled as the doctors, but not her close friends and family. They just needed someone to listen.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Reckless

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Denial

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery in South Beach
programme.desc: When a woman is killed just four days into her marriage, her husband's ex-girlfriend comes forward to tell about a plot to kill her.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Phantoms of Chernobyl
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to the large town located just outside of Chernobyl on the eve of disaster, a fleet of ghost ships, and a dangerous mountain road that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Tesla Conspiracy
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a cutting-edge research complex built by a visionary genius, an ambitious Nazi project that met a sinister end, and a Cold War relic that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Coal Mine
programme.desc: A rusting industrial complex deep in the woods was once a cornerstone of American business empire, but today, it sits deserted; experts reveal the secrets of this prosperous town's ruin.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Renewable Energy
programme.desc: Powering our world requires innovative, truly renewable energy resources. New Field Reporter Darieth Chisolm heads to Southern California to investigate biogas and hydrogen batteries powerful enough to run a city bus.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chernobyl's Nuclear Monsters
programme.desc: Strange circles of reindeer appear in the remote tundra of Sweden, experts investigate if this mysterious event could be evidence of fatal aftershocks from the Chernobyl nuclear disaster.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Phantom Island
programme.desc: When an island off the coast of Mexico suddenly disappears, government officials scramble to find an explanation; cutting-edge technology might reveal if the strange place was destroyed by a foreign power or if it existed at all.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost Tombs of the Gold Kingdom
programme.desc: Strange satellite images taken above the Nile Valley could point investigators to long-lost relics buried in an unexplored city of the dead. What they find could reveal new secrets of Kush, a once-mighty kingdom of untold gold and treasure.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ruins of Cannibal City
programme.desc: When an extreme drought hits Spain, the ruins of a long-lost civilization suddenly emerge, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate evidence of ancient cannibalism.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombietown USA
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Crop Circles
programme.desc: Crop circles spotted on an island in the Mediterranean might not be from aliens, but from a threat closer to home: Nazis; new discoveries help experts uncover who made them and for what sinister purpose.

programme.title: American Monster: Staten Island Love Story
programme.desc: When popular teacher Simeonette Mapes-Crupi is found dead in her Staten Island condo, all evidence points to a brutal robbery gone wrong. But as detectives dig deeper, they uncover a wealth of secrets, lies and sins, that leads to the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: American Monster: Who Am I?
programme.desc: When Dianne Hart and Donnie Rudd begin an affair in a small Chicago suburb, Dianne's kids hope that their mom has found love. But instead it triggers a series of bizarre lies and deceptions that reveal a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: American Monster: My Body
programme.desc: Sandy Miles and her daughter Tracie are as close as can be. But when Tracie vanishes and Sandy is found brutally murdered, the truth behind the killing is more horrific than investigators can possibly imagine.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Taken Away
programme.desc: Jessie Bardwell seemingly vanished from the Texas home she shared with her boyfriend, Jason Lowe. Fearing the worst, her father traveled to Texas to start the search for his daughter. Her body was later found on a farm wrapped in a sheet.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Tracking the Murders of Israel Keyes
programme.desc: Get a look at never-before-seen evidence in the FBI's search to identify victims of a notorious serial killer.

programme.title: What Happened in Apartment 23?
programme.desc: A Northeastern University student is found dead in her own apartment. Surveillance video reveals her final moments, but the mystery behind her murder remains unsolved for years until finally, a witness comes forward.

programme.title: See No Evil: Beth's Last Party
programme.desc: On December 23rd 2009, Beth von Steinner goes missing. Days later, her frozen body is found in a trash pile behind her house. With no witness or suspects, only CCTV footage can unlock the mystery of who killed her.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Tracking the Murders of Israel Keyes
programme.desc: Get a look at never-before-seen evidence in the FBI's search to identify victims of a notorious serial killer.

programme.title: What Happened in Apartment 23?
programme.desc: A Northeastern University student is found dead in her own apartment. Surveillance video reveals her final moments, but the mystery behind her murder remains unsolved for years until finally, a witness comes forward.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: In 1979, 6-year-old Etan Patz left his New York City home headed for a school bus stop but never made it. And he's never been found. Richard Schlesinger tells the story of the lost boy that continues to haunt investigators.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Marathon Lover
programme.desc: Remy and Jennifer Ramsaran are living the American dream in Upstate New York. When Remy begins an affair with Jennifer's best friend he's unaware that his wife has become engrossed in a virtual affair. The only plausible outcome is a deadly one.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Handcuffs for Three
programme.desc: George Arthur and his wife are two of Los Angeles County Sheriff 's finest, but when their open marriage mixes work with pleasure, their lives are forever changed by cold hearted killing that takes police more than a decade to solve.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Absent Father
programme.desc: When Jim Durgan's body is found in Prison Valley, no one knows why. His estranged wife is drawing a blank and his out-of-state girlfriend can't explain it. What follows is a murky investigation that unravels a sinister and cleverly staged murder plot.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Second Shot
programme.desc: When Dianne Hood is gunned down outside a community center in Prison Valley, no one can understand why anyone would want to murder the well-liked housewife. The answer involves betrayal, greed and obsession, in an infamous love-triangle murder plot.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: Impossible Perpetrator
programme.desc: When teen Candace Hiltz is shot dead in Prison Valley, the cops pursue her troubled brother James. With no evidence against him, the case goes cold until ten years later when a cop's storage unit is discovered to contain evidence in Candace's murder.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Neighbors are sometimes miles apart in the tiny town of Horton, Kansas, but news travels fast when Patricia Kimmi disappears from her home. Evidence leads investigators to believe she may not be found alive. And worse, that her killer still lurks.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed the Music?
programme.desc: When John Tarwacki Sr. discovers the bodies of his son and daughter-in-law, the only story told at the scene is found in the snow. Boot prints reveal the path the killer took, but the search for motive will lead police in a startling direction.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Open Door Policy
programme.desc: The brutal murder of Mike and Terri Greene hits close to home in Grand Ledge, Michigan. The couple was beloved by everyone in the small town and Mike was a retired police officer. Evidence of a personal grudge, but could the motive so clear cut?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Roses are Red, Murder is Too
programme.desc: When a town counsel member is found murdered in her home, residents of Berryville, Virginia are appalled. With the only evidence being the single bullet that took her life, the slaying begins to look more and more like a professional hit.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Prints of Darkness
programme.desc: When Michael and Melisa Augustson move to little Alma, Georgia they're soon taken in by the community. But on December 14th, Michael comes home to a scene of unspeakable horror. His wife has been murdered, and only one person in the town knows why.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: 'Til Death Do Us Part" takes on a whole new meaning when a wife of thirty-four years loses the love of her life after he's kidnapped and she's nearly killed by his abductor. But nothing is what it seems in this gothic tale of murder, deceit and cover-up.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: It's a Christmas day murder scene Portland detectives will never forget, a young woman bound, gagged and mutilated in a horrific manner. And when the killer then turns his sick sights on Homicide Detective Molly Daul, the stakes rise even higher.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: She Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: A young Iranian mom and wife lands the perfect job with a Portland insurance agency. But her charm and intellect make her the focus for several male co-workers. Corporate intrigue turns to cold-blooded murder when she's found dead, shot in the head.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deathbed Confessions
programme.desc: Deathbed confessions could provide real evidence of the existence of UFOs. The truth about alien contact is not limited to the military, and in fact, many believe such secrets extend well into outer space, even on Mars itself.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Dumped
programme.desc: The main suspect in the murder of a pregnant ex-girlfriend, and wanted for the shooting of a current one, Michael Alfonso is a jealous boyfriend who time and again turns to violence. It is Alfonso's criminal lifestyle that gets him caught.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through a Toilet
programme.desc: Lifelong pals and criminals Timothy Fletcher and Doni Brown break out of a Florida prison in 2009. Anxious for freedom, the two need money. A robbery that ends in murder puts them on most wanted lists and leads cops on a manhunt across the Southeast.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Dead Man's ID
programme.desc: Michael Hess is a wanted prison escapee on the run with a new identity and has been living in the same town he is wanted in for two decades. Hess learns to beat the system and enjoy his new life of work, weed and women before he's busted.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Sing Karaoke
programme.desc: Joe Crouch wakes up one morning, and after 40 years of marriage, shoots his wife while she sleeps. He flees to Florida and embraces his fugitive life. He funds his hobbies by robbing banks. It is his love of karaoke that gets him caught.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught by a Cougar
programme.desc: Robert Spencer has just shot his girlfriend. He is a thug and drug dealer, who in a blind panic gets high and goes on the run, living every day as a party. He finds the affection of a friend's mother, which ultimately leads to his arrest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Dead Man's ID
programme.desc: Michael Hess is a wanted prison escapee on the run with a new identity and has been living in the same town he is wanted in for two decades. Hess learns to beat the system and enjoy his new life of work, weed and women before he's busted.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Shaky Ground
programme.desc: Three new build teams arrive to their build sites and begin work on their unique cabins in the remote Alaskan wilderness. Josh Tousignant and his crew make the long trip to Cordova to begin building the foundation for their clients' two-story cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Moving on to Plan X-Ray
programme.desc: Josh and his team begin work on the interior walls and install the second-story floor joists in their Cordova cabin. At Trinity Lake, Chris must adapt when he runs out of lumber to build a dock and the framers he hired don't show up.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Playing Catch Up
programme.desc: All three builds are running behind schedule and must rush to get ahead. John and Heather build a water catchment system but discover they aren't getting enough water pressure, Chris Maynard's windows are delivered by helicopter in strong winds.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Not for Beginners
programme.desc: Time is running out for the builders to complete their projects. Chris gets help installing solar panels and sets up cameras to watch for bears. Meanwhile, Josh works on the custom log stairs as Jeremy takes his time to cut and build custom windows.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Look What They've Done
programme.desc: The builders are in the final push to finish their cabins before winter strikes and they must shut down. Josh and his team fight the elements to install the wood stove and finish the roof. Chris and his wife rush to install kitchen counters and furniture.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Kristin Cavallari's Baby Shower
programme.desc: Television star Kristin Cavallari will be expecting great cupcakes as four talented bakers compete to serve their sweet treats at her star-studded baby shower.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes for the Queen
programme.desc: It will be a British Invasion of the sweet kind when four English bakers fight for the chance to have their cupcakes featured at an exclusive party celebrating Queen Elizabeth's Diamond Jubilee.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Rock and Roll Cupcakes
programme.desc: Bakers compete for a showcase at a party celebrating the I Heart Radio music festival.

programme.title: Chopped: Chopped: Impossible, Part 1
programme.desc: Through three preliminary battles, 'Restaurant: Impossible's' Robert Irvine will command a seat on the judging panel, as twelve returning champs face some of the most mind-blowing baskets in Chopped history.

programme.title: Chopped: Chopped: Impossible, Part 2
programme.desc: Four new returning champs take on the second preliminary round of the Chopped: Impossible tournament, with Chef Robert Irvine watching their every move from the judges' table.

programme.title: Chopped: Chopped: Impossible, Part 3
programme.desc: Four previous 'Chopped' Champions are returning to compete for a spot in the grand finale of the 'Chopped: Impossible' tournament, featuring Chef Robert Irvine as a judge. First, they must take on a swamp creature and insects in the appetizer round.

programme.title: Chopped: Chopped: Impossible, Grand Finale
programme.desc: After winning their preliminary rounds of the tournament, three champions return to battle for $15,000 and the chance to go head-to-head with Robert Irvine to take home an additional $25,000.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wild Yeast Risin'
programme.desc: First the pandemic, then the zombies, then the nukes and now: desolation and a giant dinosaur-thing. Luckily there is still yeast in the air, and Alton proves that with a wild sourdough in the kitchen along with cheese crackers and waffles.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Take Stock: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this show from 2003, creating a better, more flavourful, faster stock and then turning that into a chicken soup ... all in less than two hours ... the dish, not the show.

programme.desc: Bob and Squid deliver Krabby Patty pizza; Bob loses his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.desc: Bob and Pat's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.desc: SpongeBob is the hall monitor at boating school; Bob takes a jellyfish home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Pal for Gary
programme.desc: SpongeBob brings Gary a pet that terrorizes him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants/ Opposite Day
programme.desc: SpongeBob quits his job for the jellyfish; Bob is convinced that it's Opposite Day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chaperone/ Employee of the Month
programme.desc: SpongeBob agrees to take Mr. Krab's daughter to the prom; Bob and Squidward battle it out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SB-129/ Karate Choppers
programme.desc: Squidward ends up in a freezer; Bob and Sandy's incessant karate sparring wreaks havoc.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Bob and Pat convince Mr. Krabs to play Treasure Hunt; Bob hops on the wrong bus.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Slash and Destroy
programme.desc: The Turtles find themselves being hunted by a new threat: another mutant turtle called Slash, who has a personal vendetta against the brothers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Kraang Conspiracy
programme.desc: Feeling left out of the action, April insists on joining the Turtles on a mission to TCRI, where they learn a shocking secret about April's past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Good, the Bad and Casey Jones
programme.desc: After encountering mutants and ninjas, Casey Jones decides to take on 'pure evil' alone. When he meets Raphael, the two hot-headed fighters must put their dislike for each other aside and work together against a common foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Fungus Humungous
programme.desc: A fungus mutant spreading through the sewers causes the Turtles and April to experience their worst fears as Leonardo must face his greatest fear-losing his team.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Metalhead Rewired
programme.desc: When Donnie upgrades Metalhead's artificial intelligence, he must decide if he can trust a sentient Metalhead or if he has created a new foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Of Rats and Men
programme.desc: When the Rat King returns, Splinter must overcome his guilt and fear of the Rat King controlling his mind in order to defeat his foe once and for all.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Wormquake!
programme.desc: Facing Shredder's deadly new assassin, Leo must decide whether to risk his brother's lives or ask for Splinter's help. Donnie must put aside his rivalry with Casey in order to uncover a new Kraang plot.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: iHear/ Switch Witch
programme.desc: Alvin gets a device that lets him listen in on everyone's conversations. When the kids' Halloween candy disappears, they're sure the culprit is 'Switch Witch.'

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: House Pest
programme.desc: When Miss Croner finds termites have infested her home, she moves in with the chipmunks and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Across the Universe/ Brit's Picks
programme.desc: Alvin bets Bo Carter that alien life exists and only has a week to prove it or suffer embarrassing consequences; Brittany's furious when she thinks Alvin has been writing on her blog.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Rose by Any Other Name/ Queen Bee
programme.desc: Simon's experiment of how plants respond to positive or negative feedback creates a monster, and it is growing. Brittany's fear of bees turns into admiration when she's shrunk down to their size and experiences life as a bee.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Brawl in the Hall
programme.desc: When Charlotte is challenged to a fight at school, Captain Man and Kid Danger step in to try and help Charlotte defend herself.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Rock Box Dump
programme.desc: When a report comes out that Kid Danger's super power is actually an illness, Kid Danger has to convince Swellview that it is a huge misunderstanding.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Back to the Danger
programme.desc: When Drex prevents young Ray from ever being densitized in the past, Henry and a now destructible Ray must take on Drex and help Ray get back his indestructibility.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Rubber Duck
programme.desc: When Ray accidentally destroys Henry's dad's prized remote-control car, they throw a manicure party to raise money to fix it.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Budget Cuts
programme.desc: When the Vice Mayor cuts Captain Man and Kid Danger's budget to build a high-speed railway in Swellview, Captain Man and Kid Danger must figure out creative ways to save money.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Toon in for Danger
programme.desc: When Henry and Ray get a copy of the new Kid Danger and Captain Man cartoon and see that it's horrible, they must hurry to fix the cartoon before the big premiere party.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Car Trek
programme.desc: Charlotte's birthday road trip to see the Boo Man Group perform gets sidetracked by a Captain Man and Kid Danger emergency.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Saturday Night Lies
programme.desc: When Ray runs into an ex-girlfriend, he tries to impress her by pretending that Henry, Charlotte, and Jasper are his children.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry's Frittle Problem
programme.desc: When Henry's dad gets an offer for a new job in Bordertown, Henry and Ray go undercover to try and stop Henry's dad from getting the job and prevent Henry from having to move.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Look At the Flowers

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Too Far Gone
programme.desc: Just when everything started to calm down at the prison, Rick and his group now face imminent danger and destruction. This time, they might not win.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: No Sanctuary
programme.desc: Rick and the group find themselves in a vulnerable position as the true motives of the Terminans come to light.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: No Way Out

programme.title: The Walking Dead: What Comes After

programme.title: The Walking Dead: The Day Will Come When You Won't Be

programme.title: Movie: Creepshow

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Pop Goes the Easel
programme.desc: The boys duck police in an art school.

programme.title: Movie: The People Under the Stairs

programme.title: Movie: Halloween 4: The Return of Michael Myers
programme.desc: After slaughtering his asylum handlers, masked killer Michael Myers returns to Illinois to terrorize his niece, Jamie. Dr. Loomis seeks a way to permanently stop Michael's murdering tendencies while trying to save both Jamie and the other townspeople.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween 5: The Revenge of Michael Myers
programme.desc: One year after being shot, Michael Myers awakens from a coma and sets out to find his traumatized niece, Jamie, who is in a hospital. Unbeknownst to him, Jamie has developed a telepathic link to him, which she plans to use to defeat him.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween: The Curse of Michael Myers
programme.desc: Six years after disappearing from a police station, Jamie entrusts her newborn baby to one of the survivors of Michael's rampage, who seeks, with the help of Dr. Loomis, to end the curse once and for all.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween: Resurrection
programme.desc: In this eighth instalment, Michael Myers returns to stalk and kill a group of students who are spending Halloween night in his childhood home as part of a reality TV show.

programme.title: Movie: Halloween H2O: 20 Years Later

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof

programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tar Rigger
programme.desc: Mike heads to San Diego to get dirty with the tar rigging crew of the Star of India, the oldest active merchant ship in the world. Then, Mike takes a look back at some of the dirty tools he's used that make civilized life possible for the rest of us.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dirty Chip Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads to the Dirty Potato Chips factory and learns how potato chips are made and what it takes to keep the machines used to make them clean and in working order. Then it's off to Rifle, CO where Mike attempts to clean a "monster" hidden underground.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sheep Castrator
programme.desc: Mike works at an automobile dealership where the job is sawing down a giant concrete wall to make room for a new washbay, then heads to a sheep farm where he tries his hand at sheep shearing & castrating before getting treated to Rocky Mountain Oysters.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Leech Trapper
programme.desc: Mike teams up with the boys from Bartos Bait & Fish to catch leeches that will later be sold for fish bait; then it's off to the Green Tripe factory in Hollister, CA where Mike helps make BARF (Biologically Appropriate Raw Food) for dogs.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mannequin Factory
programme.desc: Mike finds himself at the Windsorland Mobile Home Park where homes are being broken down to make room for a new shopping center, and then he heads off to Patina-V where he learns that making mannequins is not only a dirty job, but a form of art as well.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Egg Farm
programme.desc: Mike visits a Chicken Farm to see how eggs make it to the store. There, he finds out that 1.4 million chickens equal a lot of poo, which he gets the chance to clean. Later, Mike learns how dirty dirt becomes clean dirt as he sterilizes soil in Oklahoma.

programme.title: I Quit: Winner Takes All
programme.desc: While all of the businesses faced challenges, three of them have impressed the mentors with their perseverance and passion. The entrepreneurs are invited to New York for one more mentoring session, unaware that one of them will walk away with $100,000.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Avian Vomitologist
programme.desc: Travelling the country, Mike lends a helping hand at the Colorado marble quarry before collecting owl vomit. Mike later learns how to palpitate a cow to check for pregnancy.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Turkey Farmer
programme.desc: Mike examines the short lives of turkeys as they make their way from farm to sandwich. Then, it's off to a potato farm, where Mike digs in the dirt for colourful taters that will revolutionize fries. He removes sewage from a water treatment plant as well.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Alligator Farmer
programme.desc: Mike finds himself in another one of the world's dirtiest places on earth when he visits a sugar mill. Later Mike will tackle fire overhauling with the finest firefighters before visiting a menacing alligator farm.

programme.title: I Quit: Winner Takes All
programme.desc: While all of the businesses faced challenges, three of them have impressed the mentors with their perseverance and passion. The entrepreneurs are invited to New York for one more mentoring session, unaware that one of them will walk away with $100,000.

programme.title: I Quit: Partners in Conflict
programme.desc: Alex and Sibrena's meeting with their mentor comes to an explosive climax. Esrever's trip to a wine festival takes a shocking turn. Matteo's wife Julie proves to be a valuable asset, but making her a partner in Versattire is easier said than done.

programme.title: I Quit: Uncertain Futures
programme.desc: Mentor Tricia Clarke-Stone visits Ashanti, Tyshemia and Jasmine once more to find out if their Esrever wine business has a future. Meanwhile, Versattire's Matteo and Julie fly to Paris Fashion Week, and Blue Coolers' Marcus and Chris hit the road.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Wild Alaska Cruises - Mark Few
programme.desc: We go fishing in Alaska with basketball coach Mark Few.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today
programme.desc: A look at the visionaries bringing inspiration, creation and growth to tomorrow's world.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: Bass Pro Tour: 2020 Stage Five Championship Round - Sturgeon Bay
programme.desc: The Stage Five Championship Round of Bass Pro Tour, from Sturgeon Bay Wisconsin.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Josh travels to the remote and landmine-riddled jungles of Cambodia to investigate the lost city of the Khmer Empire and search for a mystical relic that over 1,000 years ago gave its God King the power to incinerate his enemies.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Josh hunts down new evidence on the iconic disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He first treks to uncharted tribal lands of PNG, then ends his journey in Fiji hoping to uncover the human remains of Amelia.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Morgan's Lost Gold
programme.desc: Josh dives into the Lajas Reef off Panama's coast in search for treasure chests on the sunken flagship of legendary pirate Captain Morgan. His journey takes him to Panama City and he visits the Panama Canal, a modern marvel.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Columbus: Legend or Liar?
programme.desc: Josh travels worldwide to uncover the myths behind Christopher Columbus.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Sunstone
programme.desc: Josh heads to the U.K. and Norway to unlock the secrets of the Viking Sunstone, a mystic crystal the Vikings used to conquer the sea. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church and descends 1,000 feet into a deserted mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: City of Gold
programme.desc: Josh treks the stone-paved Inca Trail, ascending 20,000 feet through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of the undiscovered City of Gold. His road to riches takes a detour to the legendary ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of the Nazca
programme.desc: Josh flies to Peru to investigate the giant geoglyphs drawn into earth by ancient Nazca tribes. By studying newly found lines and joining a Nazca psychedelic ritual, Josh uncovers the true meaning behind the mysterious tracings.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Radioactive Rocks
programme.desc: A dialysis patient is bleeding and doctors can't get it to stop. A naked man falls into a cactus and is covered head to toe in needles. A patient brings radioactive rocks to the hospital causing chaos in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dumpster Smash
programme.desc: A man smashed by a dumpster clings to life; an elderly nun and a drunken prostitute are in the ER at the same time; a woman suffering an apparent stroke may have a deadly rare virus, but her medical intern son doesn't agree with the doctor's suspicions.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: A man has a snapping turtle clamped to his neck, and it will not let go. As a hurricane closes in, an ER doctor rushes to get all the patients out. A man is impaled by a chainsaw while trimming trees twenty feet high.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Drama Mama
programme.desc: The real reason behind a teenager's bulging tummy and stomach pains shocks nurses, doctors and even her meddling mom. A delirious man yelling for his 'car' reveals clues about his own attempted murder, and a college co-ed mysteriously stops breathing.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: An off-duty ER physician diagnoses his own critical illness en route to the hospital. A visiting ER doctor is threatened while working at a remote hospital. A patient with ominous symptoms returns to the ER multiple times after a trip.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Plastered!
programme.desc: A college student comes in with a plaster mask on her face. A patient's heart stops and restarts on its own, confusing doctors. Two teenagers who came separately have similar symptoms.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rattled
programme.desc: A snake bite victim may die in the ER when life-saving anti-venom isn't available; a mother is near death after having a C-section and doctors are torn over treatment options.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: A Trio of Options

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: What Would Phaedra Do?
programme.desc: Bride Nikki gets a big surprise when her favourite celebrity idol shows up to help her choose the wedding gown of her dreams. Meanwhile, bride Melody is ready to see her custom jet-black gown, but her mom may not approve of this non-traditional choice.

programme.desc: WNBA star and bride Angel has a game plan to say yes to a pantsuit, but her friend thinks she should sport a dress. Bride Angel's fiancée, Brande, isn't sure about the kind of dress she wants. Meanwhile, bride Cassie is on the hunt for the perfect veil.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Two Montes are Better Than None

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: I Feel Fierce

programme.desc: This episode will shock.

programme.title: Friends: The Last One

programme.title: Friends: The Last One

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Ross's ex-wife, Carol, tells him she is pregnant and wants to give the baby both her and her female lover's last names, but not Ross's. Monica goes on a manic cleaning spree to impress her parents, who favour Ross.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Thumb
programme.desc: Chandler's reunited with his beloved cigarettes, which the rest of his friends can't stand. Monica dates a man all her buddies love but with whom she's bored. And Phoebe can't deal with the fact that her bank gave her one thousand dollars that isn't hers.

programme.title: Friends: The One With George Stephanopoulos
programme.desc: When a pizza guy accidentally delivers a pizza meant for George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street to the female friends, the women decide to peek at the towel-clad former White House advisor with their binoculars.

programme.title: Mom: Somebody's Grandmother and the A-List

programme.desc: Bonnie helps Christy gain perspective as she considers a life-changing decision. Also, Jill fears she’s running out of time to have a baby and consults a fertility doctor.

programme.title: Mom: Beef Baloney Dan and the Hot Zone

programme.title: Mom: A Judgy Face and Your Grandma's Drawers
programme.desc: Christy, Bonnie and the ladies step in to help when Marjorie babysits her granddaughter for the first time.

programme.title: Full House: Crimes and Michelle's Demeanor

programme.title: Full House: The I.Q. Man

programme.title: Full House: Slumber Party

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned From Bikini Bottom/ Stanley S. Squarepants

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: The Greater Good

programme.title: Movie: Rio

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's Spookiest Scenes Countdown Special

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dear Vikings/ Ditchin'
programme.desc: When Krusty Krab starts a new promotion in honour of the Vikings, SpongeBob sets out to learn all he can about this civilization.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Chaperone/ Employee of the Month

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch. Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Happy/ Old Man Patrick
programme.desc: SpongeBob can't drive, but you don't need a license to operate a self-driving car. Patrick thinks he is an old man, so SpongeBob reminds him how much fun it is to be a kid.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fools in April/ Neptune's Spatula
programme.desc: It's April Fool's Day, so SpongeBob gets to play harmless pranks for the entire day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: High Sea Diving/ Bottle Burglars
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean. When SpongeBob Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it's up to them to steal it back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.desc: Celia may lose her hoarded home of shoplifted items and her illegal hoard of dogs if she doesn't get under control. Nathan did not feel accepted after coming out as gay.

programme.title: Hoarders: Three Amigos

programme.title: Movie: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Captain Richard Phillips and his crew had their ship hijacked by Somali pirates in 2009. Witness the story of the first American cargo ship hijacking in 200 years.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Firefighter's Ball (Part One)

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Firefighter's Ball (Part Two)
programme.desc: Things go off the rails for the crew as the Ball rages on. Teddy and Eddie find themselves stuck in an elevator, Ike deals with a drunk Andy, while Lucy struggles to find alone time with her date.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Trust Me as Someone Who Has One!
programme.desc: Horse the squirrel meets a cataclysmic end. The Tenderloins renew their long standing cat vs dog fight, and one contestant makes waves by revealing who is 'statistically the best.'

programme.title: The Misery Index: No One Told Sal
programme.desc: Find out what happens when your parachute doesn't open, when your new parent is a sex doll, and what makes Jameela hide behind her podium.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: It's Damien's House
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer has a surefire sexy way to get out of picking up the check, Julian McCullough takes a lot of heat for his 'drug dealer' shirt, and Tone Bell has harsh words for karaoke goers.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: We're Going Hard Tonight
programme.desc: Paul Virzi proves he's your kids worst camp counselor, Gina Yashere defends women in fedoras, and Josh Wolf risks beheading if he ever travels back to England.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: This is My Art, Dad!

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Fighting Back the Tears

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Chris Webber vs. Bo the Fan
programme.desc: Broadcasting legend Rich Eisen shows one fan there's no such thing as a free lunch, an interactive video game gets a little too realistic, and Chris Webber teams up with former teammate Lou Williams to get things popping.

programme.title: Chris Webber's Full Court Pranks: Candace Parker vs. Delmy the Fan
programme.desc: Wrestling legend Bill Goldberg shows how shooting a commercial is backbreaking work, and football star Travis Kelce is back to test some products. Plus, one fan can't look up to WNBA superstar Candace Parker anymore.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the benefits of spiders, serves up knowledge on why we should be eating more bugs as a protein source, and illustrates the benefits of little bugs on your gut health.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Himself
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam battles with his inner self-doubt over how biases affect the show. He then explores the shortcomings of storytelling and the influence (or lack thereof) of advertising on the integrity of the series.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Supercuts
programme.desc: Find out which entrepreneur sparked a Jokers fashion debate, when Joe first starting 'nosing' people and which challenge was originally filmed for the pilot episode.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wanted to film at a dentist's office, and what challenge the crew considers to be one of the greatest. Plus, find out why it's so hard to film on park benches.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Inventions 8
programme.desc: Stars offer hilarious commentaries while viewing footage of the world's dumbest people.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Inventions 11
programme.desc: Twenty more inventions including a way to make pooping in the woods even more exciting, a way to cool your man parts for optimal baby making, and a sound system for the great beyond.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Smartest Inventions 12
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the smartest inventions ever to hit the market. There's a flask for your butt, a way to re-shape meat, and the last doughnut security system you'll ever need.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 13
programme.desc: These inventions could put Thomas Edison to shame, from a bird feeder with a shocking high-voltage surprise, to a bowl made entirely of bacon and a wacky way to grow bananas at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: The guys pair up to share educational ideas with perplexed parents, then teach Krav Maga to martial arts newbies. When one joker refuses, he becomes the big loser, and faces an opponent that scares the pants off him.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hollywood
programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Journey to Healing

programme.title: Giada in Italy: Culinary Renaissance
programme.desc: Giada spends several days working in the restaurants of celebrated master Chef Fabio Picchi, where she shares knowledge and, in turn, learns the art of Florentine cuisine.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Keeping It Breezy
programme.desc: Inspired by his childhood summer days at the Jersey Shore, Bobby Flay and Beach Bites host Katie Lee throw a breezy brunch for their guests.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Pork
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing new ways to cook with pork, and she's putting bacon, sausage, kielbasa and tenderloins in the spotlight.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Twin City Treats
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli brings a taste of home to her friend, Minnesota native Melissa Peterman, tempting her with the best Midwest bounty.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Tailgate Get-Togethers
programme.desc: Ree shares a lineup of tailgate-friendly favourites including Italian pork sandwiches and butternut squash and black bean enchiladas. There are also easy slow-cooker teriyaki ribs and a Greek seven-layer dip that's perfect for fall.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast Hacks
programme.desc: Ree is testing delicious ideas for kitchen hacks to up her breakfast game. There's a shortcut to the divine with chocolate chip hazelnut pancakes, and she's going experimental with a crazy omelet in a bag.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Faq Freezer
programme.desc: It's a Pioneer freezer FAQ, with answers starring one dough, two cookies to create both chocolate chip and cherry and lime treats. There's a fantastic freezer-friendly butternut squash soup, plus spicy chicken spaghetti and a roasted tomatillo sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Alex's Care Pack
programme.desc: Ree Drummond sends a care package to her daughter Alex in college. Packed alongside ranch photos for a homesick cure are brownie cookies, homemade cheddar crackers, spicy party mix and crazy chocolate bark.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Harvest Pre-Haul
programme.desc: It's beet harvest pre-haul time, and Molly Yeh is making the coziest foods imaginable to keep her husband, Nick, primed for the work ahead. She whips up her tender spiced beef hotdish with bacon jalapeno cornbread, loaded potato skins.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Around the World
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood showcases her flair for cooking international dishes like Mediterranean stuffed collard greens, her version of Greek stuffed grape leaves. She also makes French beef bourguignon and chicken fettuccine alfredo with her husband Garth Brooks.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Simple Speedy Dishes
programme.desc: The Kitchen shares their favourite recipes that are fast and flavourful. Katie Lee begins with a quick, easy way to make a classic with her grilled chicken parmesan and Alex Guarnaschelli shares a simple pork, tofu and vegetable stir fry.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Our Best Big Batch Recipes
programme.desc: The Kitchen is making big batch recipes that are perfect for meal prep or family dinners. Jeff Mauro starts with his escarole, sausage, peppers and beans cheat sheet on the grill. Then, Geoffrey Zakarian makes a big batch of his Ratatouille.

programme.title: Outrageous Pumpkins: Trick-or-treating Nightmare
programme.desc: Six expert pumpkin carvers tackle 3-D sculpting challenges, starting with science experiments gone wrong in the Quick Carve round. Things heat up in the Big Carve round when the competitors incorporate fire in 3-D dioramas of trick-or-treating pumpkins.

programme.title: Halloween Wars: Monster Support Group
programme.desc: The four remaining teams are challenged to create astonishing and delectable Halloween-themed displays showing that even the scariest monsters need friends, too. Actress Katie Sarife joins the judges to pick the winning team.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Super Stocked: An Offal Halloween
programme.desc: In a spook-tacular Halloween cook-off our chefs start out with some pumpkin bowling to determine the frightening ingredients in their daring dish. Next, competitors rummage through some creepy clearance carts to find ingredients to make a dish.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Episode: Someone Stole a Spoon
