programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Bodacious Vidalia
programme.desc: When Walden encourages a depressed Alan to update his look and start dating again, Alan faces a moral dilemma when he attracts a married woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Cows, Prepare to Be Tipped
programme.desc: Walden dates a hot 22-year-old but finds himself more interested in her grandmother. Meanwhile, Alan and Jake go on a father-son bonding trip.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nangnangnangnang
programme.desc: Alan is shocked when Charlie's 25-year-old daughter shows up at Walden's beach house to connect with what's left of her family and who happens to like everything her dad liked, including women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Think I Banged Lucille Ball
programme.desc: When Walden feels cramped in his own house, Jenny moves in with Evelyn and her boyfriend, Marty. Meanwhile, Alan becomes Lyndsey's 'other man.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: This Unblessed Biscuit
programme.desc: Walden and Alan think it may be time for Berta to retire when she injures her back at work.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Clank, Clank, Drunken Skank
programme.desc: Walden starts partying with Jenny and her hot friends. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey’s illicit affair is jeopardized.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Justice in Star-Spangled Hot Pants
programme.desc: When Alan learns Walden knows Lynda Carter, he asks him to set him up on a date with her. Against his better judgment, Walden agrees to invite her to the house for dinner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Some Kind of Lesbian Zombie
programme.desc: Walden and Alan find themselves on dates with two ideal women until Lyndsey’s jealousy throws a wrench in their evening.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. Walden, He Die. I Clean Room
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey's illicit affair puts Walden in danger, forcing him to accept Rose's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Numero Uno Accidente Lawyer
programme.desc: Walden's date with an accident-prone model goes longer than expected. Meanwhile, Alan dates a woman who shares some surprising personal information with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: On Vodka, on Soda, on Blender, on Mixer!
programme.desc: Walden helps Jenny get a second date with a one-night stand. Alan receives a Japanese delicacy from Jake for Christmas, and Walden's Malibu house is alive with questionable Christmas carol lyrics.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Pilot
programme.desc: Christine's 8-year-old son, Ritchie has been accepted into a posh private school where Christine encounters two snooty class moms, Marly and Lindsay, who seem unable to grasp the concept that Christine actually works.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Supertramp
programme.desc: When Christine learns that Richard and new Christine are enjoying an intimate relationship, she becomes determined to make her own conquests. After several failed attempts to meet eligible men, she finally runs into a guy named Stan at the grocery store.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Open Water
programme.desc: When Christine learns that her close friends, Barb and Pete, are responsible for introducing Richard to his new girlfriend named Christine, she allows them to set her up on a blind date of her own. Meanwhile, Matthew takes Ritchie to swimming lessons.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: One Toe Over the Line, Sweet Jesus
programme.desc: Richard plays the part of the jealous ex-husband when he learns that Christine is enjoying her fifth date with a new beau, Burton. He even goes as far as to sabotage the happy couple's goodnight kiss and intentionally insults Burton.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: I'll Show You Mine
programme.desc: After 10 dates, Christine faces a critical moment in her relationship with Burton. Will she or won't she? Let him in the house, that is, to meet her son, Ritchie. She eventually relents, only to be thrown for a loop later.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Other F Word
programme.desc: Christine's attempt to promote racial and ethnic diversity at Ritchie's exclusive private school has unintended consequences.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Long Day Journey Into Stan
programme.desc: Following Christine's break-up with Burton, everyone expects her to fall apart emotionally but she insists she is fine and looking forward to spending time alone. But after being humiliated in a restaurant she realizes that she really did care for him.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Teach Your Children Well
programme.desc: Christine feels pressured to throw an extravagant party for Ritchie's birthday, his first involving kids from his new school. Recoiling from sticker shock after meeting with an event planner, Christine decides to have an arts and crafts party at home.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Ritchie Has Two Mommies
programme.desc: Christine tries not to have a meltdown when her ex-husband, Richard, brings his 'new' Christine with him to pick up Ritchie and take him to breakfast so that they can get to know one another.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: No Fault Divorce
programme.desc: Christine's former marriage counsellor comes into the gym, leading to some awkwardness between the women. When Christine mentions this to Richard, his cryptic reaction leads her to wonder if it was in the counsellor's interest to encourage their divorce.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Exile on Lame Street
programme.desc: Fearing that Ritchie is too young to be exposed to sex, drugs and rock and roll vices on display at a Rolling Stones concert, Christine initially forbids it. Eventually, she relents but immediately regrets and in a panic, goes to the venue to keep tabs.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Close to Home
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a remote town in Colorado overwhelmed by feral cats. A staff member's beloved dog needs emergency surgery. Dr. Baier gives some injured birds of prey a second chance. And, Jeff races to save the life of a family's precious Chihuahua.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: At Home With Wolves
programme.desc: A young girl hopes that Dr. Jeff can save her puppy from a deadly virus. The team treats a stray cat with a life-threatening injury. And Dr. Jeff must gain the trust of rescued wolves to help an ailing member of the pack.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Brave Little Dog
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a dog with a mysterious injury. Dr. Petra helps vet tech Jess' Dalmatian after it eats something toxic. A neglected turtle needs a new home, and the team falls in love with a litter of stray kittens.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A First for Dr. Jeff
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff performs a surgery he'd never done before on a dog with labored breathing. A senior canine was abandoned by his owner and the staff must find him a new forever home, while neglected ornate box turtles are saved by Dr. Baier.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The New Challenge
programme.desc: As a new normal emerges, Dr. Jeff and the Planet Pethood Plus family must rally together to ensure proper care for their animals. With no time to spare, the staff must spring into action when a dog is hit by a car, and a cat suffers from a risky bleed.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Miska's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Vet Leanne races to rescue critically injured koalas from Australia's blazing bushfires. A two-tonne rhino calf named Kipenzi wreaks havoc in the zoo trucks, and the carnivore team eagerly awaits to see if snow leopard Miska reveals an exciting secret.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Wishing for a Meerkat Miracle
programme.desc: At the zoo, a recent fire is suspected to be what's keeping Chester's hornbills from having chicks and a meerkat called Huskie has baby blues. Meanwhile, a sun bear called Millie has a feisty cub on her paws.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: The New Challenge
programme.desc: As a new normal emerges, Dr. Jeff and the Planet Pethood Plus family must rally together to ensure proper care for their animals. With no time to spare, the staff must spring into action when a dog is hit by a car, and a cat suffers from a risky bleed.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Nine Lives
programme.desc: When a beloved dog is hit by a car, Dr. Jeff battles to save his shattered leg. Then, Dr. Amy takes on a new challenge treating seven bad-tempered chickens, and a tiny kitten found unconscious at a construction site unites everyone in a fight to save it.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Miska's Big Reveal
programme.desc: Vet Leanne races to rescue critically injured koalas from Australia's blazing bushfires. A two-tonne rhino calf named Kipenzi wreaks havoc in the zoo trucks, and the carnivore team eagerly awaits to see if snow leopard Miska reveals an exciting secret.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Disappearance of the Warty Pig
programme.desc: Visayan warty pig Wendy is fed up with the attentions of male pig Jake and decides to escape. She can't be found overnight, despite a major search by the keepers.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: One More Chance
programme.desc: Jeff is faced with saving a dog that goes into cardiac arrest shortly after arriving at his clinic.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Rocks and Crocs
programme.desc: A dog is brought into the clinic with a suspected broken leg, but Dr. Jeff quickly diagnosis a far more serious condition requiring urgent surgery. Vet tech Tasha is forced to overcome her childhood fear of birds. And, a cat's appetite gets it in trouble.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Drug Run River
programme.desc: Game wardens Gould and Hickerson chase drug smugglers that crossed the Rio Grande River. Game warden Boone checks out an injured bird. Game warden Damron relocates a feisty marsupial and her babies. Amundson and Poole meet a fan.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lying Dogs
programme.desc: The Game Wardens patrol the beach, lake and land, as summer is in full swing. Wardens educate a dog owner about leaving pets in the sun. An under-age drinker tells too many lies. Wardens inspect novice jet skiers on a busy recreational lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue. People are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. An argument between neighbors is mediated. Fishermen receive citations on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sparks Flying
programme.desc: During the holiday weekend a jet skier is reported missing, while another is caught without a life vest. Warden Kiel witnesses a fist fight during the fireworks, and warden Cummings handles underage drinkers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Call
programme.desc: When a 12-foot gator manages to trap itself in wires, the wardens are determined to set it free. Warden Boone responds to a domestic dispute call, and a grey fox is found trapped in a residential area. Meanwhile, a darted goose chase ensues.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stag Poaching
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Gould responds to the call about an exotic red stag that was shot. In Hunt County, a plethora of warrants are dispersed for unpaid fishing violations, while Warden Flores and Williams join forces on the last day on patrol.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Liars and Trespassers
programme.desc: Game Warden McGee rushes to a domestic altercation. Game Wardens Zuniga and Roel run into trespassers, while Provasnik inspects a potentially stolen jet ski. Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up on an investigation, and a baby squirrel is rescued.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: So Many Deer, Such Little Time
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Thrill of the Hunt
programme.desc: A tense confrontation ensues when Wardens Scott and Gould respond to a call about an illegal deer hunting case. A pair of raccoons find their way to a gas station and must be trapped, and Warden Boone handles a disgruntled hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Reckless Behavior
programme.desc: During deer hunting season, Wardens Gould and Scott respond to a call about finding carcasses on private property. Then, stray bullets are shot into a horse owner's home, while hunters are questioned about hunting illegally.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.desc: Singing a nursery rhyme summons a demonic figure known as Crooked Man. Once sung, everyone in the house is doomed to die by his hands.

programme.title: Movie: Monster House
programme.desc: Three kids try to convince everyone in town that a neighbourhood house is alive. When no one believes them, they decide to enter the house and solve the mystery.

programme.title: Movie: The Mask
programme.desc: A bank clerk finds an ancient mask that turns him into a smooth-talking superhero.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: On his 11th birthday, Harry Potter receives a mysterious letter from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, telling him he has been chosen as one of the future students of the renowned school.

programme.title: Home Town: Leaving the Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds are ready to move out of a parents' garage apartment and into their first home together. With an all-in budget, these two local artists hope to find a house with a master suite, large open kitchen and plenty of room for entertaining.

programme.title: Home Town: There's Just Something About a Porch
programme.desc: A couple is looking for a historic home in the country with a porch and plenty of green space. Ben and Erin transform their new home into a classic, dogtrot-style house full of historic charm and Southern touches.

programme.title: Home Town: A Southern Dream
programme.desc: A woman inherits her mom's house after she passes away, but it's far too small for her growing family. Ben and Erin come up with an ambitious plan to double the size of the house, adding a master suite and two additional bedrooms upstairs.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House: Can You Believe I'm Living Here?
programme.desc: After taking a huge chunk off their 1960s fixer upper, a couple is living with a gutted living room and kitchen with no plans on how to fix the demolition. Jasmine works with their dwindling budget to create a stunning beach house retreat.

programme.title: Hidden Potential: Tricks of the Trade: California Cape Cods
programme.desc: Scott and Iliana have trouble entertaining with their house's cramped quarters and limited seating areas and hope their $90,000 budget will get them a functional floor plan.

programme.title: Hidden Potential: Tricks of the Trade: First-time Homebuyers

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Lady and the Damp
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a water damaged French Provincial in Leawood, Kansas. Years of neglect have destroyed the basement and Tamara will need to be completely redo it.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Out With the Old, in With the Bold
programme.desc: Tamara modernizes a Tudor home in desperate need of being brought out of the 70's. The outdated kitchen gets a much-needed upgrade while two uninspired living spaces get transformed into statement making rooms on the first floor.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Classic Meets Modern Farm
programme.desc: Tamara turns a big, old farmhouse into a charming country living style home. She'll create a large open floor plan with a new walk in pantry. On the second level she turns a faux fireplace into the real thing and renovates the master suite and bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Tidal Wave of Tile
programme.desc: A neoclassical colonial gets a classic Tamara Day rehab. Tamara brings her unique design style to this home updating a kitchen, parlor and breakfast nook while keeping the historic charm intact on every level.

programme.title: Good Bones: Fountain Square Flashback
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are headed back to their old stomping grounds in the Fountain Square neighborhood, to tackle a charming old bungalow. They bought the property from a couple who lived there for more than 50 years and knew it would be taken care of.

programme.title: Good Bones: New House, Old Spirit
programme.desc: Mina and Karen venture just east of downtown Indy to take on a two-storey, worn-down home that's as risky as it is disgusting. The house has almost no sustainable foundation, so the ladies try to rebuild from the ground up while adding features.

programme.title: Good Bones: Tad's Tiny Home
programme.desc: Mina and Karen look to turn an old garage on one of their rental properties into a tiny home for Mina's brother, Tad. With foundation issues and a mysterious broken pipe, this tiny home has massive issues that must be resolved before Tad can move in.

programme.title: Good Bones: First House on the Block
programme.desc: Mina and Karen renovate the first of several houses they purchased on Talbott Street in Indianapolis. The three-bedroom, one-bath home has architectural challenges including a foundation that sags causing the floor to slope.

programme.title: Good Bones: Old Biker Bar
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back on Talbott Street in Old Southside neighbourhood at a house that used to be an old motorcycle biker bar that they're turning back into a single-family home. The home will have a massive addition and pay tribute to its biker roots.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Back on Earth

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Breaking All the Rules

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Bark at the Moon
programme.desc: The Osbournes watch footage of UFO armies on the moon, and Jack shares video evidence from the infamous Skinwalker Ranch. The family is stunned by footage of pissed-off poltergeists, and compare souls to flatulence.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Crazy Babies

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe: Now You See It (Now You Don't)
programme.desc: Jack shows footage of a living vampire, crop circles, ghostly car accidents, and Jesus Christ's grand return. Ozzy and Sharon decide if they are now believers.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: Chased by a Bigfoot and More
programme.desc: An investigative team explores a cursed cabin and deals with the frightening, and life threatening, consequences. A Sasquatch chases a group of young Russians in their car. Terrifying and mysterious sounds trumpet from skies around the world.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught on Camera: A Sasquatch Spotted in Siberia and More

programme.title: Movie: How to Be Single

programme.title: Movie: How to Be Single

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: Several young women and men, from committed relationships and singles, try to understand the signals and the intentions of the other sex. A variety of situations and misunderstandings develop the truth about dating in the modern world.

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: Several young women and men, from committed relationships and singles, try to understand the signals and the intentions of the other sex. A variety of situations and misunderstandings develop the truth about dating in the modern world.

programme.title: Movie: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Five interconnected couples come to understand love and that life does not always deliver what you expect.

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: In the age of social media where dating apps thrive on a swipe left or right, hopeful singles looking to form a true connection, take the ultimate plunge when they embark on a blind date.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: The War of Real Estate
programme.desc: Newly single Josh Flagg plays mentor to a teenage buyer with an eight million dollar budget for an after-school creative haven. Meanwhile, Josh Altman's domination continues while British besties David and James chase a $45 million estate in Holmby Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Bye, Felicia
programme.desc: Old rivalries rear their ugly head when Josh Flagg's teenage client falls for Josh Altman's multi-million-dollar listing in the Bird Streets, leading to the agents facing off at the negotiating table for the first time ever.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Fuschia My Life!
programme.desc: Josh Altman lists a stunning modern home with a $2-million closet, but is left hung out to dry when his client refuses every offer. Josh Flagg takes an Internet mogul shopping for a fixer to flip into a multi-million-dollar masterpiece.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Back on Market
programme.desc: The gloves come off when Madison's easy beachfront sale is jeopardized by his client working with another agent. Meanwhile, Josh Flagg lands a historical party pad, and Josh Altman juggles two Santa Monica listings and struggles to keep them straight.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Montcalm and Carry On
programme.desc: Josh Altman is caught between his fiancée and his client in a deal that could result in triple commission. Josh Flagg refuses to give up as he struggles to attract a buyer for his historic hilltop listings. The Brits' partnership begins to unravel.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: White Wedding Day
programme.desc: Josh and Heather prepare to say their vows in Aspen, but first face off in a tough negotiation that could keep them from walking down the aisle. Josh Flagg lists a coveted lot in the Beverly Hills flats, but his strategy backfires.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Zeppo Marx the Spot
programme.desc: Josh Flagg lists a mid-century modern home built by Zeppo Marx, and must fight off developers looking to bulldoze the iconic structure. Newlyweds Josh and Heather return home from their wedding and are up against a ticking clock to find their dream house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Nightmare on Altman Street
programme.desc: David and James throw a massive party as a last ditch effort to sell their St. Ives listing, but find that agents are just looking to take advantage of their client’s financial situation.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Turn and Burn
programme.desc: Josh Altman battles his own client over a $20 million listing price for a sexy Sunset Strip bachelor pad. Josh Flagg makes a big decision that his friends and family find shocking. Madison hustles to help a client downsize to a new Westside home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Surf vs. Turf
programme.desc: Madison goes up against David and James for a modern Malibu compound, but when the owner toys with the idea of teaming them all up, Madison doesn’t pull any punches to try and win the listing for himself.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Co-list From Hell
programme.desc: Josh Flagg whisks Bobby off to Paris to propose and worries his behaviour will blow the surprise. Meanwhile, Josh Altman takes on a listing with an unpredictable homeowner. Madison and the Brits continue to clash over their co-list and things get ugly.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Best and Final
programme.desc: Josh Flagg pops the question to his beau in true style. James and David take on a home that's been on the market for over 800 days with no buyer in sight. Madison tries to close a deal with a client who fired him in order to land a dream listing.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre named Shrek finds his swamp home overrun with exiled fairytale creatures, including a talkative companion named Donkey. Shrek strikes a deal: he will get his swamp back if he rescues Princess Fiona and brings her to the scheming Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: Movie: Baywatch
programme.desc: The leader of a team of elite lifeguards immediately doesn't like their new hire, a disgraced Olympian. The two must put aside their differences when they discover a criminal mastermind's drug trafficking operation at the heart of their beach.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds

programme.desc: A Los Angeles drug dealer sells cocaine destined for celebrities, and a Peruvian farmer feeds his family selling coca leaves to the cartels.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Jamaica Buzz
programme.desc: Kingston, Jamaica, is in the hands of highly organized and warring drug gangs who manage drug trafficking and distribution at all levels.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: High Behind Bars
programme.desc: Inmates still find ways to get drugs inside jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: Danger Island
programme.desc: Puerto Rico is now a major gateway for cocaine to pass through to the US and its residents are experiencing a wave of violence, and its streets are in the grip of a drug epidemic.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: London Falling
programme.desc: Cocaine and marijuana dominate a drug fueled 24-hour lifestyle for Londoners, who work hard and play even harder.

programme.title: Drugs, Inc.: The Fix: High Behind Bars

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: Kingdom of the Kims
programme.desc: For decades, Korea and its people labour under Japanese imperialist rule. In 1912, in a small town outside Pyongyang, a child is born - Kim Il Sung, coinciding with an omen of imperialism's doom.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: The Son of God
programme.desc: Unpacking the unique Kim father-son relationship further, 'Son of God' tracks the decline of Kim Il Sung and the rise of his son, Kim Jong Il.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: Nuclear Family
programme.desc: 'A Nuclear Family' begins as the Cold War ends — and North Korea has lost Soviet patronage, and with it, the security it guarantees and the economic support that has sustained the country for nearly half a century.

programme.title: Inside North Korea's Dynasty: Rocket Man
programme.desc: With the death of Kim Jong Il and the rise of the new leader of North Korea — his son, Kim Jong Un, taking power at the age of 28.

programme.title: Hitler Youth: The Nazi Child Army
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, the Nazi Party created the Hitler Youth to indoctrinate children and adolescents with Nazi ideology and prepare them to become a child army for Hitler.

programme.title: Hitler Youth: Child Army's Last Stand

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Attack on America
programme.desc: Scientists search the ocean for a shipwreck connected to Hitler. The U.S. government hid it after Hitler's Navy dropped a deadly assault on American ships on December 19, 1941.

programme.title: Nazi Underworld
programme.desc: Dig deeper into Adolf Hitler's inner circle to discover this dictator's identity beyond what is found in history books. Follow a list of characters that spans the full spectrum of German society.

programme.title: After Hitler: Part One
programme.desc: WWII in Europe is over, but the brutality continues for many, after Hitler.

programme.title: After Hitler: Part Two

programme.title: When Nature Calls: Snake, Rattle and Roll

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Sand Wars
programme.desc: Discover the multitudes of bizarre creatures that make the sandy plains of the seabed their home.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Examine the paradox of whales, penguins, iguanas and dolphins that inherited a burdensome legacy from their land-dwelling ancestors: they must breathe in open air.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Predator's Paradise
programme.desc: Explore the living, breathing, colourful mountains of coral that shelter an extraordinarily diverse group of species of every colour, shape and behaviour.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Oceans: Giants of the Deep
programme.desc: Discover the lives of some of the great predators that haunt the vast oceanic desert including blue whales and hordes of tuna.

programme.title: Monster Fish: River Jaws
programme.desc: Zeb travels to Australia to try and track down two of the country's river shark species, on the biggest and one the rarest.

programme.title: Monster Fish: River Wolf
programme.desc: Zeb is heading into the heart of Guyana in search of fish with a terrifying reputation: the wolf fish. This species is said to be a brutal hunter of animals and reportedly even humans.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Frankenfish
programme.desc: Zeb Hogan, an explorer and aquatic biologist, goes in search of monster snakehead in Thailand, their natural habitat, and Florida, where they have become aggressive invaders.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Vampire Fish
programme.desc: The Vampire fish, known locally as payara, can weigh up to 40 pounds, hunts like a great white shark, has terrifying 6-inch fangs, and Zeb really wants to find one.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Shark Eating Goliath
programme.desc: Zeb goes hunting in the Atlantic waters off the coast of Florida to find the Goliath Grouper and uncover the surprising truth about this gigantic fish's monstrous reputation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Island of Alien Ooze
programme.desc: Satellite images capture a volcanic island that suddenly appears in the Pacific Ocean, and when NASA scientists arrive to investigate, they are baffled to find its home to a primordial slime and zombie creatures with origins in outer space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chinese Nuclear Pyramid
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of a mythical lost pyramid in China that's been hidden for centuries, and experts suspect it could be just one of many unknown structures used as a secret military base designed for subterranean nuclear warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Serengeti Alien
programme.desc: When a strange black blob is spotted moving across the Serengeti, leaving a trail of destruction behind, experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate why this eerie phenomenon looks like something found on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Once an Animal
programme.desc: A cold case from Northern California heats up when Detective Molly Daul ties a brutal assault case she's working on to this twelve year old murder. And when this killer strikes in Portland, multiple homicide detectives team up to take him down.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Everybody's Daughter
programme.desc: When Kate Johnson is murdered in her dorm room, detectives are stumped why this innocent young woman was targeted. After taking 400 DNA samples and establishing a secret task force, detectives track down Kate's killer and get their chilling answer.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Beautiful Northwestern Airlines flight attendant Nancy Ludwig is discovered dead in her hotel room, her body mutilated and head almost decapitated. It will take the discovery of links to another heinous killing to blow the case wide open.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Vanishing Teens
programme.desc: In the fall of 1991, rural Michigan is plunged into paranoia and fear when four local teenage girls vanish without a trace. The community is in lockdown as residents face up to the very real possibility that a predator walks among them.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 1: Missing
programme.desc: In October 1989, 10 year-old-Amy Mihaljevic is lured to a suburban Ohio shopping mall by an unknown man and is never seen again. A 30 year mystery and nationwide manhunt ensues, thousands of leads, hundreds of suspects, one killer still at large.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains at large. A cavalcade of suspects emerges, each more compelling than the last. Investigators explore each one. Then, 106 days after Amy was taken, a gruesome discovery some 50 miles away from her Bay Village home: a body.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic? Part 3: New Evidence
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains on the loose and the case goes nationwide. Margaret appears on Oprah, anniversaries come and go, and then, finally, a confession. A man stands up in church in a neighboring town and declares: 'I killed Amy Mihaljevic.'

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Heartbreak Hotel
programme.desc: Beautiful Northwestern Airlines flight attendant Nancy Ludwig is discovered dead in her hotel room, her body mutilated and head almost decapitated. It will take the discovery of links to another heinous killing to blow the case wide open.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: After they fail to turn up for an annual maple tapping celebration, Ian and Nancy Blackburn's lifeless bodies are discovered stuff into the trunk of their own car. The whirlwind investigation will unmask a monster who hid in plain sight.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Trail of Frozen Tears
programme.desc: Pretty pre-teen Rosie Davenport is found brutally murdered in an abandoned house, the circumstances of her death eerily similar to the unsolved murder of 13-year-old Malissa Thomas one year earlier.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Night Shift Nightmare
programme.desc: The naked body of 19-year-old Wanda Musk is found just miles from where she worked at local gas station. In the wake of the vicious killing, suspicions mount over several young men in the community including her ex-boyfriend and a troubled local teen.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Case of 'Affluenza'
programme.desc: A privileged 16 year old with a troubled past, killed four innocent people while driving drunk. The defense team argument the teen suffered from 'affluenza'. This strategy worked and the teen did not go to jail.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Dangerous Intersection
programme.desc: A report on the curious relationship and crazy coincidences that started with a chance traffic encounter, and ended with the killing of a beloved mother of four, Tammy Myers.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A woman's exclusive and emotional conversation with her adoptive father, Donald Robinson, who discusses his belief at the time that her adoption was legitimate and learning about his brother's horrific crimes.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A woman's exclusive and emotional conversation with her adoptive father, Donald Robinson, who discusses his belief at the time that her adoption was legitimate and learning about his brother's horrific crimes.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Unfriendly Community
programme.desc: One June morning cleaning lady Myra heads into the property office and is confronted by a nightmare scene. The office has been ransacked and there is blood everywhere- property manager Melinda Schaefer is dead. Police work hard to get justice.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Before He Was King
programme.desc: Watch an investigation into the backstory of the self-proclaimed 'Tiger King.' Learn what sent Joe down a path of depravity and ultimately, conspiracy to commit murder. Every lead will be evaluated as we claw our way to the truth.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Team Tiger
programme.desc: Oklahoma wild animal zookeeper Joe Exotic fights to get out of prison and intensifies his feud with Carole Baskin, while the jury foreman exclusively explains the guilty verdict and an investigation reveals Carole's husband's will may be a forgery.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Into the Eye of the Tiger
programme.desc: An ex-boyfriend believes Carole cares more about her animals than most people, while a former homicide cop explores property transfers from Carole to handyman Kenneth Farr and searches a lake for Don's body and a meat grinder.

programme.title: Joe Exotic: Tigers, Lies and Cover-Up: Catch a Tiger by the Tail
programme.desc: Joe Exotic seeks a presidential pardon and keeps his spirits buoyed behind bars with the love of his husband and fan letters, as Don Lewis's handyman is confronted with allegations about his disappearance and Don's family seeks answers and closure.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Momma Made Me Help
programme.desc: When Shirley Furgala helped her mother, Betty Lou Beets, drag a dead body to the yard and bury it, she knew her own life might be in danger if she refused to help. What Shirley didn't know was this wouldn't be the last time her mother would ask for help.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bruce Reynolds
programme.desc: Bruce Reynolds was a career criminal who, looking for his defining moment, planned a daring train robbery in 1963. Reynolds secretly organised a gang of 15 men to bring down a Royal Mail train carrying over two million pounds in cash.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays
programme.desc: English gangsters and twin brothers Ronald and Reginald Kray were the foremost perpetrators of organized crime in the East End of London during the '50s and '60s.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bruce Reynolds
programme.desc: Bruce Reynolds was a career criminal who, looking for his defining moment, planned a daring train robbery in 1963. Reynolds secretly organised a gang of 15 men to bring down a Royal Mail train carrying over two million pounds in cash.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays
programme.desc: English gangsters and twin brothers Ronald and Reginald Kray were the foremost perpetrators of organized crime in the East End of London during the '50s and '60s.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fury
programme.desc: On June 28, 1914, the assassination of an obscure Austrian archduke in Sarajevo triggers the most disastrous conflict the world has ever known. Germany becomes an enemy to France, invades Belgium and, in September, arrives at the gates of Paris.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Fear
programme.desc: The French Army stops the German advance at the battle of the Marne while the Germans halt the Russians at the Tannenberg on the eastern front.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Call of The Loon

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Retro-fit for the Whole Family

programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust
programme.desc: A young cabin builder creates a one-of-a-kind cabin in upstate New York during the harsh winter months. Due to the new and complicated design, the crew must adapt to the environment, work efficiently and leave no room for mistakes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Restored: The 1955 Mid-century California Ranch
programme.desc: Brett opens up the floor plan of a 1950s mid-century ranch and makes the space more livable for a family of four while staying true to the original style.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fry Hard II: The Reload

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: I Pie: The Reload

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Nova Scotia
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores iconic dishes of picturesque Nova Scotia, Canada, which became a fishing hub after being settled by Europeans in the 16th century. The proximity to the sea -- it's never more than 42 miles away!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily

programme.desc: Max and Phoebe use their powers to give their friend a confidence boost, but the gesture backfires when he recklessly starts to think he that he has superpowers of his own.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Revenge of the Smith
programme.desc: Excited to be honored for their heroism with a school mural, Phoebe and Max learn that the artist holds a personal grudge, and the tribute isn't what they imagined.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Odd Jobs/ Movie Magic
programme.desc: Dad wishes he had a cooler job; Timmy enters a film festival to impress Trixie.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Good Ol' Days/ Future Lost
programme.desc: Timmy gets babysat by Dad's dad; Timmy and Dad come upon Dad's favourite childhood book.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: End Game
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Many Unhappy Returns
programme.desc: The TMNT must stop a persistent foe from shredding NYC, but problems arise when they split up to handle things.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Todd Scouts/Goyles, Goyles, Goyles
programme.desc: The TMNT need to learn how to listen and get in touch with nature in order to save Todd after he’s captured by a group of hunters.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Flushed but Never Forgotten/ Lair Games
programme.desc: The Turtles have a secret that comes back to haunt them. April presents her award winning documentary about the Turtles annual event: The Lair Olympics.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fast Feud/ Never Friending Story
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid try to take down the obnoxious burger restaurant that opened up across the street. After picking Par as his new best friend, Bobby realizes he may be in over his head.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Grandparent Trap/ Miss Step
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: The Loud House: Intern for the Worse/ The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love
programme.desc: When the kids hear Lily curse, they're worried they have been a bad influence on her. A love letter addressed to 'L' Loud shows up at the house and the family has to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe's Untied/ Squid's Day Off
programme.desc: Pat doesn't know how to tie the laces on his new shoes; Mr. Krabs take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Patrick takes SpongeBob on as his role model; SpongeBob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dying for Pie/ Imitation Krabs
programme.desc: Squidward lets Bob eat an exploding pie; Plankton disguises himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket
programme.desc: Sandy Cheeks has taken on the inevitable mission of taking a rocket ship into outer space. Sneaking in for a look, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally launch Sandy's rocket and mistakenly think they have landed on the moon.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mazes and Mutants
programme.desc: The Turtles try to relax by playing a fantasy role-playing game, but when the game becomes real, the must learn the difference between fantasy and reality.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Lonely Mutation of Baxter Stockman
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman kidnaps and threatens to mutate April.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Newtralized!
programme.desc: Raphael is worried about Casey's ability to handle big mutant threats when they meet Slash again and discover he has a partner of his own: The Newtralizer!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Wrath of Tiger Claw
programme.desc: Tiger Claw returns and sets out to destroy the Ninja Turtles at any cost.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Pizza Face
programme.desc: Mikey discovers that a new mutant is trying to attack and capture people using living pizzas, but he struggles to convince the others who don't believe him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Legend of Kuro Kabuto
programme.desc: Leo, worried about Karai, tries to convince the others to rescue her, while a master thief steals Shredder's helmet, and it falls into the Turtles' unsuspecting hands.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Plan 10
programme.desc: Ralph's hot-headed impulsiveness lands him in deep trouble when he accidentally damages a machine that forces him to switch minds with a Kraang.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Vengeance is Mine
programme.desc: Leo goes behind Splinter's back when he stages a rescue for Karai, whose desire for revenge against Shredder brings about grave consequences for all.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lost in Space...Camp/ Super Hot Chocolate
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theo's Big Night Out/ The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Theodore tries to overcome his fear of sleep-overs by spending the night at Kevin's house without Alvin or Simon. When Alvin sees every celebrity with their own personal bodyguard, he decides to train Theodore for the job.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Slippin Thru My Fingers/ Driving Dave Crazy
programme.desc: In order to get Dave off their backs, the Chipmunks decide to find him a new girlfriend. Dave orders the Chipmunks to clean their room, but in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song for the music festival.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Open Wide and Say Aaahg
programme.desc: Timmy's tonsils are coming out and nurse Vicky is determined to make his visit unpleasant.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: You Doo/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Timmy gets his hands on 'YouDoo' dolls; Timmy wishes for all food on Earth to be desserts.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Boy Toy/ Inspection Detection
programme.desc: To have an adventure with his Crimson Chin action figure, Tommy wishes himself doll-sized.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crockin' the House/ Tardy Sauce
programme.desc: Mrs. Crocker leaves Mr. Crocker home alone for the first time, so he calls on Timmy to teach him how to have fun. Chloe wants to break the attendance record, but Timmy tells her school is canceled and drags her to a taco stand.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Knitwits/ Dimmsdale's Got Talent?
programme.desc: Dad takes Mom on what he thinks is a knight-themed cruise to renew their vows, but it's really a knitting cruise. Mr. Bickels hosts a talent show and everyone gets in, but Timmy.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Z's All That
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max get to act as a superhero mentor to one of their siblings, but quickly regret selecting Nora after seeing Billy's surprisingly impressive skillset.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Come What Mayhem
programme.desc: With one of his old pranks is set to ruin a superhero gathering, Max enlists Phoebe's help to stop it.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Significant Brother
programme.desc: Sparks fly between Phoebe and Cherry's visiting brother, prompting Cherry to grow concerned that she will be overshadowed by this new romance. After Cherry begs Phoebe not to date her brother, Phoebe must decide between love and friendship.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Looperheroes
programme.desc: The Z-Force gives Max and Phoebe a superhero day off, but when they relive the day over and over again, they must find a way to break the loop.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Obake Yashiki
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The First Ever Summer Games Showdown
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Mark on Fire
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Night of the Living Pharmacists
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' accidentally turns the citizens of Danville into contagious Doof-zombies who run rampant all over town. Agent P and the kids must work together to save Danville and avoid becoming Doof-zombies themselves.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Heat Beaters / Bill-iever
programme.desc: Cricket and Remy play a game of 'H-O-R-S-E'; Cricket tries to make his dad believe in aliens to avoid punishment.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Educating Boyd
programme.desc: When Mike blames the public school system for suspending his grandson, Boyd, from public school, he tells Ryan they should start looking at private schools. Meanwhile, Kristin and Kyle try to capture a raccoon that's loose in the Outdoor Man restaurant.

programme.title: Black-ish: Mother Nature
programme.desc: Bow is feeling overwhelmed after the birth of DeVante and learns she is suffering from postpartum depression. Dre urges her to get help and stands by her side while she works through it.

programme.title: Black-ish: Super Rich Kids
programme.desc: Dre has always felt his older son was never like him, but when he finally meets Junior's cool friends, Dre is all in and happy that his son may have the opportunity for an actual social life.
